\t\treturn false, nil\n1668: \t}\n1669: \n1670: \texcludeAlerts, err := strconv.ParseBool(excludeAlertsParam)\n1671: \tif err != nil {\n1672: \t\treturn false, fmt.Errorf(\"error converting exclude_alerts: %w\", err)\n1673: \t}\n1674: \treturn excludeAlerts, nil\n1675: }\n1676: \n1677: func parseListRulesPaginationRequest(r *http.Request) (int64, string, *apiFuncResult) {\n1678: \tvar (\n1679: \t\tparsedMaxGroups int64 = -1\n1680: \t\terr             error\n1681: \t)\n1682: \tmaxGroups := r.URL.Query().Get(\"group_limit\")\n1683: \tnextToken := r.URL.Query().Get(\"group_next_token\")\n1684: \n1685: \tif nextToken != \"\" && maxGroups == \"\" {\n1686: \t\terrResult := invalidParamError(errors.New(\"group_limit needs to be present in order to paginate over the groups\"), \"group_next_token\")\n1687: \t\treturn -1, \"\", &errResult\n1688: \t}\n1689: \n1690: \tif maxGroups != \"\" {\n1691: \t\tparsedMaxGroups, err = strconv.ParseInt(maxGroups, 10, 32)\n1692: \t\tif err != nil {\n1693: \t\t\terrResult := invalidParamError(fmt.Errorf(\"group_limit needs to be a valid number: %w\", err), \"group_limit\")\n1694: \t\t\treturn -1, \"\", &errResult\n1695: \t\t}\n1696: \t\tif parsedMaxGroups <= 0 {\n1697: \t\t\terrResult := invalidParamError(errors.New(\"group_limit needs to be greater than 0\"), \"group_limit\")\n1698: \t\t\treturn -1, \"\", &errResult\n1699: \t\t}\n1700: \t}\n1701: \n1702: \tif parsedMaxGroups > 0 {\n1703: \t\treturn parsedMaxGroups, nextToken, nil\n1704: \t}\n1705: \n1706: \treturn -1, \"\", nil\n1707: }\n1708: \n1709: func getRuleGroupNextToken(file, group string) string {\n1710: \th := sha1.New()\n1711: \th.Write([]byte(file + \";\" + group))\n1712: \treturn hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil))\n1713: }\n1714: \n1715: type prometheusConfig struct {\n1716: \tYAML string `json:\"yaml\"`\n1717: }\n1718: \n1719: func (api *API) serveRuntimeInfo(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1720: \tstatus, err := api.runtimeInfo()\n1721: \tif err != nil {\n1722: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{status, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\n1723: \t}\n1724: \treturn apiFuncResult{status, nil, nil, nil}\n1725: }\n1726: \n1727: func (api *API) serveBuildInfo(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1728: \treturn apiFuncResult{api.buildInfo, nil, nil, nil}\n1729: }\n1730: \n1731: func (api *API) serveConfig(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1732: \tcfg := &prometheusConfig{\n1733: \t\tYAML: api.config().String(),\n1734: \t}\n1735: \treturn apiFuncResult{cfg, nil, nil, nil}\n1736: }\n1737: \n1738: func (api *API) serveFlags(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1739: \treturn apiFuncResult{api.flagsMap, nil, nil, nil}\n1740: }\n1741: \n1742: // TSDBStat holds the information about individual cardinality.\n1743: type TSDBStat struct {\n1744: \tName  string `json:\"name\"`\n1745: \tValue uint64 `json:\"value\"`\n1746: }\n1747: \n1748: // HeadStats has information about the TSDB head.\n1749: type HeadStats struct {\n1750: \tNumSeries     uint64 `json:\"numSeries\"`\n1751: \tNumLabelPairs int    `json:\"numLabelPairs\"`\n1752: \tChunkCount    int64  `json:\"chunkCount\"`\n1753: \tMinTime       int64  `json:\"minTime\"`\n1754: \tMaxTime       int64  `json:\"maxTime\"`\n1755: }\n1756: \n1757: // TSDBStatus has information of cardinality statistics from postings.\n1758: type TSDBStatus struct {\n1759: \tHeadStats                   HeadStats  `json:\"headStats\"`\n1760: \tSeriesCountByMetricName     []TSDBStat `json:\"seriesCountByMetricName\"`\n1761: \tLabelValueCountByLabelName  []TSDBStat `json:\"labelValueCountByLabelName\"`\n1762: \tMemoryInBytesByLabelName    []TSDBStat `json:\"memoryInBytesByLabelName\"`\n1763: \tSeriesCountByLabelValuePair []TSDBStat `json:\"seriesCountByLabelValuePair\"`\n1764: }\n1765: \n1766: // TSDBStatsFromIndexStats converts a index.Stat slice to a TSDBStat slice.\n1767: func TSDBStatsFromIndexStats(stats []index.Stat) []TSDBStat {\n1768: \tresult := make([]TSDBStat, 0, len(stats))\n1769: \tfor _, item := range stats {\n1770: \t\titem := TSDBStat{Name: item.Name, Value: item.Count}\n1771: \t\tresult = append(result, item)\n1772: \t}\n1773: \treturn result\n1774: }\n1775: \n1776: func (api *API) serveTSDBBlocks(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1777: \tblockMetas, err := api.db.BlockMetas()\n1778: \tif err != nil {\n1779: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, fmt.Errorf(\"error getting block metadata: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n1780: \t}\n1781: \n1782: \treturn apiFuncResult{\n1783: \t\tdata: map[string][]tsdb.BlockMeta{\n1784: \t\t\t\"blocks\": blockMetas,\n1785: \t\t},\n1786: \t}\n1787: }\n1788: \n1789: func (api *API) serveTSDBStatus(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1790: \tlimit := 10\n1791: \tif s := r.FormValue(\"limit\"); s != \"\" {\n1792: \t\tvar err error\n1793: \t\tif limit, err = strconv.Atoi(s); err != nil || limit < 1 {\n1794: \t\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\"limit must be a positive number\")}, nil, nil}\n1795: \t\t}\n1796: \t}\n1797: \ts, err := api.db.Stats(labels.MetricName, limit)\n1798: \tif err != nil {\n1799: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\n1800: \t}\n1801: \tmetrics, err := api.gatherer.Gather()\n1802: \tif err != nil {\n1803: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, fmt.Errorf(\"error gathering runtime status: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n1804: \t}\n1805: \tchunkCount := int64(math.NaN())\n1806: \tfor _, mF := range metrics {\n1807: \t\tif *mF.Name == \"prometheus_tsdb_head_chunks\" {\n1808: \t\t\tm := mF.Metric[0]\n1809: \t\t\tif m.Gauge != nil {\n1810: \t\t\t\tchunkCount = int64(m.Gauge.GetValue())\n1811: \t\t\t\tbreak\n1812: \t\t\t}\n1813: \t\t}\n1814: \t}\n1815: \treturn apiFuncResult{TSDBStatus{\n1816: \t\tHeadStats: HeadStats{\n1817: \t\t\tNumSeries:     s.NumSeries,\n1818: \t\t\tChunkCount:    chunkCount,\n1819: \t\t\tMinTime:       s.MinTime,\n1820: \t\t\tMaxTime:       s.MaxTime,\n1821: \t\t\tNumLabelPairs: s.IndexPostingStats.NumLabelPairs,\n1822: \t\t},\n1823: \t\tSeriesCountByMetricName:     TSDBStatsFromIndexStats(s.IndexPostingStats.CardinalityMetricsStats),\n1824: \t\tLabelValueCountByLabelName:  TSDBStatsFromIndexStats(s.IndexPostingStats.CardinalityLabelStats),\n1825: \t\tMemoryInBytesByLabelName:    TSDBStatsFromIndexStats(s.IndexPostingStats.LabelValueStats),\n1826: \t\tSeriesCountByLabelValuePair: TSDBStatsFromIndexStats(s.IndexPostingStats.LabelValuePairsStats),\n1827: \t}, nil, nil, nil}\n1828: }\n1829: \n1830: type walReplayStatus struct {\n1831: \tMin     int `json:\"min\"`\n1832: \tMax     int `json:\"max\"`\n1833: \tCurrent int `json:\"current\"`\n1834: }\n1835: \n1836: func (api *API) serveWALReplayStatus(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1837: \thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\n1838: \tstatus, err := api.db.WALReplayStatus()\n1839: \tif err != nil {\n1840: \t\tapi.respondError(w, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil)\n1841: \t}\n1842: \tapi.respond(w, r, walReplayStatus{\n1843: \t\tMin:     status.Min,\n1844: \t\tMax:     status.Max,\n1845: \t\tCurrent: status.Current,\n1846: \t}, nil, \"\")\n1847: }\n1848: \n1849: func (api *API) notifications(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1850: \thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\n1851: \tapi.respond(w, r, api.notificationsGetter(), nil, \"\")\n1852: }\n1853: \n1854: func (api *API) notificationsSSE(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1855: \thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\n1856: \tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"text/event-stream\")\n1857: \tw.Header().Set(\"Cache-Control\", \"no-cache\")\n1858: \tw.Header().Set(\"Connection\", \"keep-alive\")\n1859: \n1860: \t// Subscribe to notifications.\n1861: \tnotifications, unsubscribe, ok := api.notificationsSub()\n1862: \tif !ok {\n1863: \t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n1864: \t\treturn\n1865: \t}\n1866: \tdefer unsubscribe()\n1867: \n1868: \t// Set up a flusher to push the response to the client.\n1869: \tflusher, ok := w.(http.Flusher)\n1870: \tif !ok {\n1871: \t\thttp.Error(w, \"Streaming unsupported\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1872: \t\treturn\n1873: \t}\n1874: \n1875: \t// Flush the response to ensure the headers are immediately and eventSource\n1876: \t// onopen is triggered client-side.\n1877: \tflusher.Flush()\n1878: \n1879: \tfor {\n1880: \t\tselect {\n1881: \t\tcase notification := <-notifications:\n1882: \t\t\t// Marshal the notification to JSON.\n1883: \t\t\tjsonData, err := json.Marshal(notification)\n1884: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1885: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1886: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n1887: \t\t\t}\n1888: \n1889: \t\t\t// Write the event data in SSE format with JSON content.\n1890: \t\t\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \"data: %s\\n\\n\", jsonData)\n1891: \n1892: \t\t\t// Flush the response to ensure the data is sent immediately.\n1893: \t\t\tflusher.Flush()\n1894: \t\tcase <-r.Context().Done():\n1895: \t\t\treturn\n1896: \t\t}\n1897: \t}\n1898: }\n1899: \n1900: func (api *API) remoteRead(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1901: \t// This is only really for tests - this will never be nil IRL.\n1902: \tif api.remoteReadHandler != nil {\n1903: \t\tapi.remoteReadHandler.ServeHTTP(w, r)\n1904: \t} else {\n1905: \t\thttp.Error(w, \"not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n1906: \t}\n1907: }\n1908: \n1909: func (api *API) remoteWrite(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1910: \tif api.remoteWriteHandler != nil {\n1911: \t\tapi.remoteWriteHandler.ServeHTTP(w, r)\n1912: \t} else {\n1913: \t\thttp.Error(w, \"remote write receiver needs to be enabled with --web.enable-remote-write-receiver\", http.StatusNotFound)\n1914: \t}\n1915: }\n1916: \n1917: func (api *API) otlpWrite(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1918: \tif api.otlpWriteHandler != nil {\n1919: \t\tapi.otlpWriteHandler.ServeHTTP(w, r)\n1920: \t} else {\n1921: \t\thttp.Error(w, \"otlp write receiver needs to be enabled with --web.enable-otlp-receiver\", http.StatusNotFound)\n1922: \t}\n1923: }\n1924: \n1925: func (api *API) deleteSeries(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1926: \tif !api.enableAdmin {\n1927: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorUnavailable, errors.New(\"admin APIs disabled\")}, nil, nil}\n1928: \t}\n1929: \tif err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {\n1930: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\"error parsing form values: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n1931: \t}\n1932: \tif len(r.Form[\"match[]\"]) == 0 {\n1933: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\"no match[] parameter provided\")}, nil, nil}\n1934: \t}\n1935: \n1936: \tstart, err := parseTimeParam(r, \"start\", MinTime)\n1937: \tif err != nil {\n1938: \t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"start\")\n1939: \t}\n1940: \tend, err := parseTimeParam(r, \"end\", MaxTime)\n1941: \tif err != nil {\n1942: \t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"end\")\n1943: \t}\n1944: \n1945: \tfor _, s := range r.Form[\"match[]\"] {\n1946: \t\tmatchers, err := parser.ParseMetricSelector(s)\n1947: \t\tif err != nil {\n1948: \t\t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"match[]\")\n1949: \t\t}\n1950: \t\tif err := api.db.Delete(r.Context(), timestamp.FromTime(start), timestamp.FromTime(end), matchers...); err != nil {\n1951: \t\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\n1952: \t\t}\n1953: \t}\n1954: \n1955: \treturn apiFuncResult{nil, nil, nil, nil}\n1956: }\n1957: \n1958: func (api *API) snapshot(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1959: \tif !api.enableAdmin {\n1960: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorUnavailable, errors.New(\"admin APIs disabled\")}, nil, nil}\n1961: \t}\n1962: \tvar (\n1963: \t\tskipHead bool\n1964: \t\terr      error\n1965: \t)\n1966: \tif r.FormValue(\"skip_head\") != \"\" {\n1967: \t\tskipHead, err = strconv.ParseBool(r.FormValue(\"skip_head\"))\n1968: \t\tif err != nil {\n1969: \t\t\treturn invalidParamError(fmt.Errorf(\"unable to parse boolean: %w\", err), \"skip_head\")\n1970: \t\t}\n1971: \t}\n1972: \n1973: \tvar (\n1974: \t\tsnapdir = filepath.Join(api.dbDir, \"snapshots\")\n1975: \t\tname    = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s-%016x\",\n1976: \t\t\ttime.Now().UTC().Format(\"20060102T150405Z0700\"),\n1977: \t\t\trand.Int63())\n1978: \t\tdir = filepath.Join(snapdir, name)\n1979: \t)\n1980: \tif err := os.MkdirAll(dir, 0o777); err != nil {\n1981: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, fmt.Errorf(\"create snapshot directory: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n1982: \t}\n1983: \tif err := api.db.Snapshot(dir, !skipHead); err != nil {\n1984: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, fmt.Errorf(\"create snapshot: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n1985: \t}\n1986: \n1987: \treturn apiFuncResult{struct {\n1988: \t\tName string `json:\"name\"`\n1989: \t}{name}, nil, nil, nil}\n1990: }\n1991: \n1992: func (api *API) cleanTombstones(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n1993: \tif !api.enableAdmin {\n1994: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorUnavailable, errors.New(\"admin APIs disabled\")}, nil, nil}\n1995: \t}\n1996: \tif err := api.db.CleanTombstones(); err != nil {\n1997: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\n1998: \t}\n1999: \n2000: \treturn apiFuncResult{nil, nil, nil, nil}\n2001: }\n2002: \n2003: // Query string is needed to get the position information for the annotations, and it\n2004: // can be empty if the position information isn't needed.\n2005: func (api *API) respond(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, data any, warnings annotations.Annotations, query string) {\n2006: \tstatusMessage := statusSuccess\n2007: \twarn, info := warnings.AsStrings(query, 10, 10)\n2008: \n2009: \tresp := &Response{\n2010: \t\tStatus:   statusMessage,\n2011: \t\tData:     data,\n2012: \t\tWarnings: warn,\n2013: \t\tInfos:    info,\n2014: \t}\n2015: \n2016: \tcodec, err := api.negotiateCodec(req, resp)\n2017: \tif err != nil {\n2018: \t\tapi.respondError(w, &apiError{errorNotAcceptable, err}, nil)\n2019: \t\treturn\n2020: \t}\n2021: \n2022: \tb, err := codec.Encode(resp)\n2023: \tif err != nil {\n2024: \t\tapi.logger.Error(\"error marshaling response\", \"url\", req.URL, \"err\", err)\n2025: \t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n2026: \t\treturn\n2027: \t}\n2028: \n2029: \tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", codec.ContentType().String())\n2030: \tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n2031: \tif n, err := w.Write(b); err != nil {\n2032: \t\tapi.logger.Error(\"error writing response\", \"url\", req.URL, \"bytesWritten\", n, \"err\", err)\n2033: \t}\n2034: }\n2035: \n2036: func (api *API) negotiateCodec(req *http.Request, resp *Response) (Codec, error) {\n2037: \tfor _, clause := range goautoneg.ParseAccept(req.Header.Get(\"Accept\")) {\n2038: \t\tfor _, codec := range api.codecs {\n2039: \t\t\tif codec.ContentType().Satisfies(clause) && codec.CanEncode(resp) {\n2040: \t\t\t\treturn codec, nil\n2041: \t\t\t}\n2042: \t\t}\n2043: \t}\n2044: \n2045: \tdefaultCodec := api.codecs[0]\n2046: \tif !defaultCodec.CanEncode(resp) {\n2047: \t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"cannot encode response as %s\", defaultCodec.ContentType())\n2048: \t}\n2049: \n2050: \treturn defaultCodec, nil\n2051: }\n2052: \n2053: func (api *API) respondError(w http.ResponseWriter, apiErr *apiError, data any) {\n2054: \tjson := jsoniter.ConfigCompatibleWithStandardLibrary\n2055: \tb, err := json.Marshal(&Response{\n2056: \t\tStatus:    statusError,\n2057: \t\tErrorType: apiErr.typ.str,\n2058: \t\tError:     apiErr.err.Error(),\n2059: \t\tData:      data,\n2060: \t})\n2061: \tif err != nil {\n2062: \t\tapi.logger.Error(\"error marshaling json response\", \"err\", err)\n2063: \t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n2064: \t\treturn\n2065: \t}\n2066: \n2067: \tvar code int\n2068: \tif api.overrideErrorCode != nil {\n2069: \t\tif newCode, override := api.overrideErrorCode(apiErr.typ.num, apiErr.err); override {\n2070: \t\t\tcode = newCode\n2071: \t\t} else {\n2072: \t\t\tcode = getDefaultErrorCode(apiErr.typ)\n2073: \t\t}\n2074: \t} else {\n2075: \t\tcode = getDefaultErrorCode(apiErr.typ)\n2076: \t}\n2077: \n2078: \tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n2079: \tw.WriteHeader(code)\n2080: \tif n, err := w.Write(b); err != nil {\n2081: \t\tapi.logger.Error(\"error writing response\", \"bytesWritten\", n, \"err\", err)\n2082: \t}\n2083: }\n2084: \n2085: func getDefaultErrorCode(errType errorType) int {\n2086: \tswitch errType {\n2087: \tcase errorBadData:\n2088: \t\treturn http.StatusBadRequest\n2089: \tcase errorExec:\n2090: \t\treturn http.StatusUnprocessableEntity\n2091: \tcase errorCanceled:\n2092: \t\treturn statusClientClosedConnection\n2093: \tcase errorTimeout:\n2094: \t\treturn http.StatusServiceUnavailable\n2095: \tcase errorInternal:\n2096: \t\treturn http.StatusInternalServerError\n2097: \tcase errorNotFound:\n2098: \t\treturn http.StatusNotFound\n2099: \tcase errorNotAcceptable:\n2100: \t\treturn http.StatusNotAcceptable\n2101: \tdefault:\n2102: \t\treturn http.StatusInternalServerError\n2103: \t}\n2104: }\n2105: \n2106: func parseTimeParam(r *http.Request, paramName string, defaultValue time.Time) (time.Time, error) {\n2107: \tval := r.FormValue(paramName)\n2108: \tif val == \"\" {\n2109: \t\treturn defaultValue, nil\n2110: \t}\n2111: \tresult, err := parseTime(val)\n2112: \tif err != nil {\n2113: \t\treturn time.Time{}, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid time value for '%s': %w\", paramName, err)\n2114: \t}\n2115: \treturn result, nil\n2116: }\n2117: \n2118: func parseTime(s string) (time.Time, error) {\n2119: \tif t, err := strconv.ParseFloat(s, 64); err == nil {\n2120: \t\ts, ns := math.Modf(t)\n2121: \t\tns = math.Round(ns*1000) / 1000\n2122: \t\treturn time.Unix(int64(s), int64(ns*float64(time.Second))).UTC(), nil\n2123: \t}\n2124: \tif t, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, s); err == nil {\n2125: \t\treturn t, nil\n2126: \t}\n2127: \n2128: \t// Stdlib's time parser can only handle 4 digit years. As a workaround until\n2129: \t// that is fixed we want to at least support our own boundary times.\n2130: \t// Context: https://github.com/prometheus/client_golang/issues/614\n2131: \t// Upstream issue: https://github.com/golang/go/issues/20555\n2132: \tswitch s {\n2133: \tcase minTimeFormatted:\n2134: \t\treturn MinTime, nil\n2135: \tcase maxTimeFormatted:\n2136: \t\treturn MaxTime, nil\n2137: \t}\n2138: \treturn time.Time{}, fmt.Errorf(\"cannot parse %q to a valid timestamp\", s)\n2139: }\n2140: \n2141: func parseDuration(s string) (time.Duration, error) {\n2142: \tif d, err := strconv.ParseFloat(s, 64); err == nil {\n2143: \t\tts := d * float64(time.Second)\n2144: \t\tif ts > float64(math.MaxInt64) || ts < float64(math.MinInt64) {\n2145: \t\t\treturn 0, fmt.Errorf(\"cannot parse %q to a valid duration. It overflows int64\", s)\n2146: \t\t}\n2147: \t\treturn time.Duration(ts), nil\n2148: \t}\n2149: \tif d, err := model.ParseDuration(s); err == nil {\n2150: \t\treturn time.Duration(d), nil\n2151: \t}\n2152: \treturn 0, fmt.Errorf(\"cannot parse %q to a valid duration\", s)\n2153: }\n2154: \n2155: func parseMatchersParam(matchers []string) ([][]*labels.Matcher, error) {\n2156: \tmatcherSets, err := parser.ParseMetricSelectors(matchers)\n2157: \tif err != nil {\n2158: \t\treturn nil, err\n2159: \t}\n2160: \n2161: OUTER:\n2162: \tfor _, ms := range matcherSets {\n2163: \t\tfor _, lm := range ms {\n2164: \t\t\tif lm != nil && !lm.Matches(\"\") {\n2165: \t\t\t\tcontinue OUTER\n2166: \t\t\t}\n2167: \t\t}\n2168: \t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"match[] must contain at least one non-empty matcher\")\n2169: \t}\n2170: \treturn matcherSets, nil\n2171: }\n2172: \n2173: // parseLimitParam returning 0 means no limit is to be applied.\n2174: func parseLimitParam(limitStr string) (limit int, err error) {\n2175: \tif limitStr == \"\" {\n2176: \t\treturn limit, nil\n2177: \t}\n2178: \n2179: \tlimit, err = strconv.Atoi(limitStr)\n2180: \tif err != nil {\n2181: \t\treturn limit, err\n2182: \t}\n2183: \tif limit < 0 {\n2184: \t\treturn limit, errors.New(\"limit must be non-negative\")\n2185: \t}\n2186: \n2187: \treturn limit, nil\n2188: }\n2189: \n2190: // toHintLimit increases the API limit, as returned by parseLimitParam, by 1.\n2191: // This allows for emitting warnings when the results are truncated.\n2192: func toHintLimit(limit int) int {\n2193: \t// 0 means no limit and avoid int overflow\n2194: \tif limit > 0 && limit < math.MaxInt {\n2195: \t\treturn limit + 1\n2196: \t}\n2197: \treturn limit\n2198: }\n2199: \n2200: // truncateResults truncates result for queryRange() and query().\n2201: // No truncation for other types(Scalars or Strings).\n2202: func truncateResults(result *promql.Result, limit int) (*promql.Result, bool) {\n2203: \tisTruncated := false\n2204: \n2205: \tswitch v := result.Value.(type) {\n2206: \tcase promql.Matrix:\n2207: \t\tif len(v) > limit {\n2208: \t\t\tresult.Value = v[:limit]\n2209: \t\t\tisTruncated = true\n2210: \t\t}\n2211: \tcase promql.Vector:\n2212: \t\tif len(v) > limit {\n2213: \t\t\tresult.Value = v[:limit]\n2214: \t\t\tisTruncated = true\n2215: \t\t}\n2216: \t}\n2217: \n2218: \t// Return the modified result. Unchanged for other types.\n2219: \treturn result, isTruncated\n2220: }\n2221: ",

  }
}

\tMetadata []scrape.MetricMetadata\n80: }\n81: \n82: func (s *testMetaStore) ListMetadata() []scrape.MetricMetadata {\n83: \treturn s.Metadata\n84: }\n85: \n86: func (s *testMetaStore) GetMetadata(metric string) (scrape.MetricMetadata, bool) {\n87: \tfor _, m := range s.Metadata {\n88: \t\tif metric == m.MetricFamily {\n89: \t\t\treturn m, true\n90: \t\t}\n91: \t}\n92: \n93: \t\tfor _, r := range t.Reports {\n131: \t\t\tnt.Report(r.Start, r.Duration, r.Error)\n132: \t\t}\n133: \n134: \t\tif t.Active {\n135: \t\t\tactiveTargets[t.Identifier] = []*scrape.Target{nt}\n136: \t\t} else {\n137: \t\t\tdroppedTargets[t.Identifier] = []*scrape.Target{nt}\n138: \t\t}\n139: \t}\n140: \n141: \treturn &testTargetRetriever{\n142: \t\tactiveTargets:  activeTargets,\n143: \t}\n162: \treturn r\n163: }\n164: \n165: func (t *testTargetRetriever) SetMetadataStoreForTargets(identifier string, metadata scrape.MetricMetadataStore) error {\n166: \ttargets, ok := \t\t\t},\n437: \t\t},\n438: \t}\n439: \tfor _, ed := range exemplars {\n440: \t\t_, err := storage.AppendExemplar(0, ed.SeriesLabels, ed.Exemplars[0])\n441: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"failed to add exemplar: %+v\", ed.Exemplars[0])\n442: \t}\n443: \n444: \tnow := time.Now()\n445: \n446: \tng := testEngine(t)\n447: \n448: \tt.Run(\"local\", func(t *testing.T) {\n449: \t\talgr := rulesRetrieverMock{testing: t}\n450: \n451: \t\talgr.CreateAlertingRules()\n452: \t\talgr.CreateRuleGroups()\n453: \n454: \t\tg := algr.RuleGroups()\n455: \t\tg[0].Eval(context.Background(), time.Now())\n456: \n457: \t\ttestTargetRetriever := setupTestTargetRetriever(t)\n458: \n459: \t\tapi := &API{\n460: \t\t\tQueryable:             storage,\n461: \t\t\tQueryEngine:           ng,\n462: \t\t\tExemplarQueryable:     storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n463: \t\t\ttargetRetriever:       testTargetRetriever.toFactory(),\n464: \t\t\talertmanagerRetriever: testAlertmanagerRetriever{}.toFactory(),\n465: \t\t\tflagsMap:              sampleFlagMap,\n466: \t\t\tnow:                   func() time.Time { return now },\n467: \t\t\tconfig:                func() config.Config { return samplePrometheusCfg },\n468: \t\t\tready:                 func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n469: \t\t\trulesRetriever:        algr.toFactory(),\n470: \t\t}\n471: \t\ttestEndpoints(t, api, testTargetRetriever, storage, true)\n472: \t})\n473: \n474: \t// Run all the API tests against an API that is wired to forward queries via\n475: \t// the remote read client to a test server, which in turn sends them to the\n476: \t// data from the test storage.\n477: \tt.Run(\"remote\", func(t *testing.T) {\n478: \t\tserver := setupRemote(storage)\n479: \t\tdefer server.Close()\n480: \n481: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(server.URL)\n482: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n483: \n484: \t\tal := promslog.NewLevel()\n485: \t\trequire.NoError(t, al.Set(\"debug\"))\n486: \n487: \t\taf := promslog.NewFormat()\n488: \t\trequire.NoError(t, af.Set(\"logfmt\"))\n489: \n490: \t\tpromslogConfig := promslog.Config{\n491: \t\t\tLevel:  al,\n492: \t\t\tFormat: af,\n493: \t\t}\n494: \n495: \t\tdbDir := t.TempDir()\n496: \n497: \t\tremote := remote.NewStorage(promslog.New(&promslogConfig), prometheus.DefaultRegisterer, func() (int64, error) {\n498: \t\t\treturn 0, nil\n499: \t\t}, dbDir, 1*time.Second, nil, false)\n500: \n501: \t\terr = remote.ApplyConfig(&config.Config{\n502: \t\t\tRemoteReadConfigs: []*config.RemoteReadConfig{\n503: \t\t\t\t{\n504: \t\t\t\t\tURL:           &config_util.URL{URL: u},\n505: \t\t\t\t\tRemoteTimeout: model.Duration(1 * time.Second),\n506: \t\t\t\t\tReadRecent:    true,\n507: \t\t\t\t},\n508: \t\t\t},\n509: \t\t})\n510: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n511: \n512: \t\talgr := rulesRetrieverMock{testing: t}\n513: \n514: \t\talgr.CreateAlertingRules()\n515: \t\talgr.CreateRuleGroups()\n516: \n517: \t\tg := algr.RuleGroups()\n518: \t\tg[0].Eval(context.Background(), time.Now())\n519: \n520: \t\ttestTargetRetriever := setupTestTargetRetriever(t)\n521: \n522: \t\tapi := &API{\n523: \t\t\tQueryable:             remote,\n524: \t\t\tQueryEngine:           ng,\n525: \t\t\tExemplarQueryable:     storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n526: \t\t\ttargetRetriever:       testTargetRetriever.toFactory(),\n527: \t\t\talertmanagerRetriever: testAlertmanagerRetriever{}.toFactory(),\n528: \t\t\tflagsMap:              sampleFlagMap,\n529: \t\t\tnow:                   func() time.Time { return now },\n530: \t\t\tconfig:                func() config.Config { return samplePrometheusCfg },\n531: \t\t\tready:                 func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n532: \t\t\trulesRetriever:        algr.toFactory(),\n533: \t\t}\n534: \t\ttestEndpoints(t, api, testTargetRetriever, storage, false)\n535: \t})\n536: }\n537: \n538: type byLabels []labels.Labels\n539: \n540: func (b byLabels) Len() int           { return len(b) }\n541: func (b byLabels) Swap(i, j int)      { b[i], b[j] = b[j], b[i] }\n542: func (b byLabels) Less(i, j int) bool { return labels.Compare(b[i], b[j]) < 0 }\n543: \n544: func TestGetSeries(t *testing.T) {\n545: \t// TestEndpoints doesn't have enough label names to test api.labelNames\n546: \t// endpoint properly. Hence we test it separately.\n547: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n548: \t\tload 1m\n549: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo1=\"bar\", baz=\"abc\"} 0+100x100\n550: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo2=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n551: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n552: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\", xyz=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n553: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"baz\", abc=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n554: \t`)\n555: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n556: \tapi := &API{\n557: \t\tQueryable: storage,\n558: \t}\n559: \trequest := func(method string, matchers ...string) (*http.Request, error) {\n560: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n561: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n562: \t\tq := u.Query()\n563: \t\tfor _, matcher := range matchers {\n564: \t\t\tq.Add(\"match[]\", matcher)\n565: \t\t}\n566: \t\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\n567: \n568: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n569: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n570: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n571: \t\t}\n572: \t\treturn r, err\n573: \t}\n574: \n575: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n576: \t\tname              string\n577: \t\tapi               *API\n578: \t\tmatchers          []string\n579: \t\texpected          []labels.Labels\n580: \t\texpectedErrorType errorType\n581: \t}{\n582: \t\t{\n583: \t\t\tname:              \"no matchers\",\n584: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorBadData,\n585: \t\t\tapi:               api,\n586: \t\t},\n587: \t\t{\n588: \t\t\tname:     \"non empty label matcher\",\n589: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\".+\"}`},\n590: \t\t\texpected: []labels.Labels{\n591: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"abc\", \"qwerty\", \"foo\", \"baz\"),\n592: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n593: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"xyz\", \"qwerty\"),\n594: \t\t\t},\n595: \t\t\tapi: api,\n596: \t\t},\n597: \t\t{\n598: \t\t\tname:     \"exact label matcher\",\n599: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`},\n600: \t\t\texpected: []labels.Labels{\n601: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n602: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"xyz\", \"qwerty\"),\n603: \t\t\t},\n604: \t\t\tapi: api,\n605: \t\t},\n606: \t\t{\n607: \t\t\tname:     \"two matchers\",\n608: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n609: \t\t\texpected: []labels.Labels{\n610: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"abc\", \"qwerty\", \"foo\", \"baz\"),\n611: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n612: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"xyz\", \"qwerty\"),\n613: \t\t\t},\n614: \t\t\tapi: api,\n615: \t\t},\n616: \t\t{\n617: \t\t\tname:              \"exec error type\",\n618: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n619: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\n620: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n621: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\"generic\")},\n622: \t\t\t},\n623: \t\t},\n624: \t\t{\n625: \t\t\tname:              \"storage error type\",\n626: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n627: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\n628: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n629: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"generic\")}},\n630: \t\t\t},\n631: \t\t},\n632: \t} {\n633: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n634: \t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n635: \t\t\treq, err := request(http.MethodGet, tc.matchers...)\n636: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n637: \t\t\tres := tc.api.series(req.WithContext(ctx))\n638: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\n639: \t\t\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\n640: \t\t\t\tr := res.data.([]labels.Labels)\n641: \t\t\t\tsort.Sort(byLabels(tc.expected))\n642: \t\t\t\tsort.Sort(byLabels(r))\n643: \t\t\t\ttestutil.RequireEqual(t, tc.expected, r)\n644: \t\t\t}\n645: \t\t})\n646: \t}\n647: }\n648: \n649: func TestQueryExemplars(t *testing.T) {\n650: \tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\n651: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n652: \t\tload 1m\n653: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"bar\"} 0+100x100\n654: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n655: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n656: \t\t\ttest_metric3{foo=\"bar\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n657: \t\t\ttest_metric3{foo=\"boo\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n658: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"bar\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n659: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"boo\", dup=\"1\"} 1+0x100\n660: \t\t\ttest_metric4{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n661: \t`)\n662: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n663: \n664: \tapi := &API{\n665: \t\tQueryable:         storage,\n666: \t\tQueryEngine:       testEngine(t),\n667: \t\tExemplarQueryable: storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n668: \t}\n669: \n670: \trequest := func(method string, qs url.Values) (*http.Request, error) {\n671: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n672: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n673: \t\tu.RawQuery = qs.Encode()\n674: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n675: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n676: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n677: \t\t}\n678: \t\treturn r, err\n679: \t}\n680: \n681: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n682: \t\tname              string\n683: \t\tquery             url.Values\n684: \t\texemplars         []exemplar.QueryResult\n685: \t\tapi               *API\n686: \t\texpectedErrorType errorType\n687: \t}{\n688: \t\t{\n689: \t\t\tname: \"no error\",\n690: \t\t\tapi:  api,\n691: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n692: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\"boo\"} - test_metric4{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n693: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n694: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"4\"},\n695: \t\t\t},\n696: \t\t\texemplars: []exemplar.QueryResult{\n697: \t\t\t\t{\n698: \t\t\t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric3\", \"foo\", \"boo\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n699: \t\t\t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n700: \t\t\t\t\t\t{\n701: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"abc\"),\n702: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n703: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(0 * time.Second)),\n704: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n705: \t\t\t\t\t},\n706: \t\t\t\t},\n707: \t\t\t\t{\n708: \t\t\t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"foo\", \"bar\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n709: \t\t\t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n710: \t\t\t\t\t\t{\n711: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"lul\"),\n712: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n713: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(3 * time.Second)),\n714: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n715: \t\t\t\t\t},\n716: \t\t\t\t},\n717: \t\t\t},\n718: \t\t},\n719: \t\t{\n720: \t\t\tname:              \"should return errorExec upon genetic error\",\n721: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\n722: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n723: \t\t\t\tExemplarQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\"generic\")},\n724: \t\t\t},\n725: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n726: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\"boo\"} - test_metric4{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n727: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n728: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"4\"},\n729: \t\t\t},\n730: \t\t},\n731: \t\t{\n732: \t\t\tname:              \"should return errorInternal err type is ErrStorage\",\n733: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\n734: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n735: \t\t\t\tExemplarQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"generic\")}},\n736: \t\t\t},\n737: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n738: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`test_metric3{foo=\"boo\"} - test_metric4{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n739: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n740: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"4\"},\n741: \t\t\t},\n742: \t\t},\n743: \t} {\n744: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n745: \t\t\tes := storage\n746: \t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n747: \n748: \t\t\tfor _, te := range tc.exemplars {\n749: \t\t\t\tfor _, e := range te.Exemplars {\n750: \t\t\t\t\t_, err := es.AppendExemplar(0, te.SeriesLabels, e)\n751: \t\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n752: \t\t\t\t}\n753: \t\t\t}\n754: \n755: \t\t\treq, err := request(http.MethodGet, tc.query)\n756: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n757: \t\t\tres := tc.api.queryExemplars(req.WithContext(ctx))\n758: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\n759: \n760: \t\t\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\n761: \t\t\t\tassertAPIResponse(t, res.data, tc.exemplars)\n762: \t\t\t}\n763: \t\t})\n764: \t}\n765: }\n766: \n767: func TestLabelNames(t *testing.T) {\n768: \t// TestEndpoints doesn't have enough label names to test api.labelNames\n769: \t// endpoint properly. Hence we test it separately.\n770: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n771: \t\tload 1m\n772: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo1=\"bar\", baz=\"abc\"} 0+100x100\n773: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo2=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n774: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\"} 1+0x100\n775: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"boo\", xyz=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n776: \t\t\ttest_metric2{foo=\"baz\", abc=\"qwerty\"} 1+0x100\n777: \t`)\n778: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n779: \tapi := &API{\n780: \t\tQueryable: storage,\n781: \t}\n782: \trequest := func(method, limit string, matchers ...string) (*http.Request, error) {\n783: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n784: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n785: \t\tq := u.Query()\n786: \t\tfor _, matcher := range matchers {\n787: \t\t\tq.Add(\"match[]\", matcher)\n788: \t\t}\n789: \t\tif limit != \"\" {\n790: \t\t\tq.Add(\"limit\", limit)\n791: \t\t}\n792: \t\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\n793: \n794: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n795: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n796: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n797: \t\t}\n798: \t\treturn r, err\n799: \t}\n800: \n801: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n802: \t\tname              string\n803: \t\tapi               *API\n804: \t\tmatchers          []string\n805: \t\tlimit             string\n806: \t\texpected          []string\n807: \t\texpectedErrorType errorType\n808: \t}{\n809: \t\t{\n810: \t\t\tname:     \"no matchers\",\n811: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\", \"baz\", \"foo\", \"foo1\", \"foo2\", \"xyz\"},\n812: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n813: \t\t},\n814: \t\t{\n815: \t\t\tname:     \"non empty label matcher\",\n816: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\".+\"}`},\n817: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\", \"foo\", \"xyz\"},\n818: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n819: \t\t},\n820: \t\t{\n821: \t\t\tname:     \"non empty label matcher with limit\",\n822: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=~\".+\"}`},\n823: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\"},\n824: \t\t\tlimit:    \"2\",\n825: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n826: \t\t},\n827: \t\t{\n828: \t\t\tname:     \"exact label matcher\",\n829: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`},\n830: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"foo\", \"xyz\"},\n831: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n832: \t\t},\n833: \t\t{\n834: \t\t\tname:     \"two matchers\",\n835: \t\t\tmatchers: []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n836: \t\t\texpected: []string{\"__name__\", \"abc\", \"foo\", \"xyz\"},\n837: \t\t\tapi:      api,\n838: \t\t},\n839: \t\t{\n840: \t\t\tname:              \"exec error type\",\n841: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n842: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorExec,\n843: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n844: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: errors.New(\"generic\")},\n845: \t\t\t},\n846: \t\t},\n847: \t\t{\n848: \t\t\tname:              \"storage error type\",\n849: \t\t\tmatchers:          []string{`{foo=\"boo\"}`, `{foo=\"baz\"}`},\n850: \t\t\texpectedErrorType: errorInternal,\n851: \t\t\tapi: &API{\n852: \t\t\t\tQueryable: errorTestQueryable{err: promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"generic\")}},\n853: \t\t\t},\n854: \t\t},\n855: \t} {\n856: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n857: \t\t\tfor _, method := range []string{http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost} {\n858: \t\t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n859: \t\t\t\treq, err := request(method, tc.limit, tc.matchers...)\n860: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n861: \t\t\t\tres := tc.api.labelNames(req.WithContext(ctx))\n862: \t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.expectedErrorType)\n863: \t\t\t\tif tc.expectedErrorType == errorNone {\n864: \t\t\t\t\tassertAPIResponse(t, res.data, tc.expected)\n865: \t\t\t\t}\n866: \t\t\t}\n867: \t\t})\n868: \t}\n869: }\n870: \n871: type testStats struct {\n872: \tCustom string `json:\"custom\"`\n873: }\n874: \n875: func (testStats) Builtin() (_ stats.BuiltinStats) {\n876: \treturn\n877: }\n878: \n879: func TestStats(t *testing.T) {\n880: \tstorage := teststorage.New(t)\n881: \tt.Cleanup(func() { storage.Close() })\n882: \n883: \tapi := &API{\n884: \t\tQueryable:   storage,\n885: \t\tQueryEngine: testEngine(t),\n886: \t\tnow: func() time.Time {\n887: \t\t\treturn time.Unix(123, 0)\n888: \t\t},\n889: \t}\n890: \trequest := func(method, param string) (*http.Request, error) {\n891: \t\tu, err := url.Parse(\"http://example.com\")\n892: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n893: \t\tq := u.Query()\n894: \t\tq.Add(\"stats\", param)\n895: \t\tq.Add(\"query\", \"up\")\n896: \t\tq.Add(\"start\", \"0\")\n897: \t\tq.Add(\"end\", \"100\")\n898: \t\tq.Add(\"step\", \"10\")\n899: \t\tu.RawQuery = q.Encode()\n900: \n901: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(method, u.String(), nil)\n902: \t\tif method == http.MethodPost {\n903: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n904: \t\t}\n905: \t\treturn r, err\n906: \t}\n907: \n908: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n909: \t\tname     string\n910: \t\trenderer StatsRenderer\n911: \t\tparam    string\n912: \t\texpected func(*testing.T, any)\n913: \t}{\n914: \t\t{\n915: \t\t\tname:  \"stats is blank\",\n916: \t\t\tparam: \"\",\n917: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n918: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n919: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n920: \t\t\t\trequire.Nil(t, qd.Stats)\n921: \t\t\t},\n922: \t\t},\n923: \t\t{\n924: \t\t\tname:  \"stats is true\",\n925: \t\t\tparam: \"true\",\n926: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n927: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n928: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n929: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\n930: \t\t\t\tqs := qd.Stats.Builtin()\n931: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Timings)\n932: \t\t\t\trequire.Greater(t, qs.Timings.EvalTotalTime, float64(0))\n933: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples)\n934: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamples)\n935: \t\t\t\trequire.Nil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamplesPerStep)\n936: \t\t\t},\n937: \t\t},\n938: \t\t{\n939: \t\t\tname:  \"stats is all\",\n940: \t\t\tparam: \"all\",\n941: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n942: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n943: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n944: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\n945: \t\t\t\tqs := qd.Stats.Builtin()\n946: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Timings)\n947: \t\t\t\trequire.Greater(t, qs.Timings.EvalTotalTime, float64(0))\n948: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples)\n949: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamples)\n950: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qs.Samples.TotalQueryableSamplesPerStep)\n951: \t\t\t},\n952: \t\t},\n953: \t\t{\n954: \t\t\tname: \"custom handler with known value\",\n955: \t\t\trenderer: func(_ context.Context, _ *stats.Statistics, p string) stats.QueryStats {\n956: \t\t\t\tif p == \"known\" {\n957: \t\t\t\t\treturn testStats{\"Custom Value\"}\n958: \t\t\t\t}\n959: \t\t\t\treturn nil\n960: \t\t\t},\n961: \t\t\tparam: \"known\",\n962: \t\t\texpected: func(t *testing.T, i any) {\n963: \t\t\t\trequire.IsType(t, &QueryData{}, i)\n964: \t\t\t\tqd := i.(*QueryData)\n965: \t\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, qd.Stats)\n966: \t\t\t\tjson := jsoniter.ConfigCompatibleWithStandardLibrary\n967: \t\t\t\tj, err := json.Marshal(qd.Stats)\n968: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n969: \t\t\t\trequire.JSONEq(t, `{\"custom\":\"Custom Value\"}`, string(j))\n970: \t\t\t},\n971: \t\t},\n972: \t} {\n973: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n974: \t\t\tbefore := api.statsRenderer\n975: \t\t\tdefer func() { api.statsRenderer = before }()\n976: \t\t\tapi.statsRenderer = tc.renderer\n977: \n978: \t\t\tfor _, method := range []string{http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost} {\n979: \t\t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n980: \t\t\t\treq, err := request(method, tc.param)\n981: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n982: \t\t\t\tres := api.query(req.WithContext(ctx))\n983: \t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\n984: \t\t\t\ttc.expected(t, res.data)\n985: \n986: \t\t\t\tres = api.queryRange(req.WithContext(ctx))\n987: \t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\n988: \t\t\t\ttc.expected(t, res.data)\n989: \t\t\t}\n990: \t\t})\n991: \t}\n992: }\n993: \n994: func setupTestTargetRetriever(t *testing.T) *testTargetRetriever {\n995: \tt.Helper()\n996: \n997: \ttargets := []*testTargetParams{\n998: \t\t{\n999: \t\t\tIdentifier: \"test\",\n1000: \t\t\tLabels: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\n1001: \t\t\t\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \"http\",\n1002: \t\t\t\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \"example.com:8080\",\n1003: \t\t\t\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \"/metrics\",\n1004: \t\t\t\tmodel.JobLabel:            \"test\",\n1005: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \"15s\",\n1006: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \"5s\",\n1007: \t\t\t}),\n1008: \t\t\tParams:  url.Values{},\n1009: \t\t\tReports: []*testReport{{scrapeStart, 70 * time.Millisecond, nil}},\n1010: \t\t\tActive:  true,\n1011: \t\t},\n1012: \t\t{\n1013: \t\t\tIdentifier: \"blackbox\",\n1014: \t\t\tLabels: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\n1015: \t\t\t\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \"http\",\n1016: \t\t\t\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \"localhost:9115\",\n1017: \t\t\t\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \"/probe\",\n1018: \t\t\t\tmodel.JobLabel:            \"blackbox\",\n1019: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \"20s\",\n1020: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \"10s\",\n1021: \t\t\t}),\n1022: \t\t\tParams:  url.Values{\"target\": []string{\"example.com\"}},\n1023: \t\t\tReports: []*testReport{{scrapeStart, 100 * time.Millisecond, errors.New(\"failed\")}},\n1024: \t\t\tActive:  true,\n1025: \t\t},\n1026: \t\t{\n1027: \t\t\tIdentifier: \"blackbox\",\n1028: \t\t\tLabels:     labels.EmptyLabels(),\n1029: \t\t\ttargetLabels: model.LabelSet{\n1030: \t\t\t\tmodel.SchemeLabel:         \"http\",\n1031: \t\t\t\tmodel.AddressLabel:        \"http://dropped.example.com:9115\",\n1032: \t\t\t\tmodel.MetricsPathLabel:    \"/probe\",\n1033: \t\t\t\tmodel.JobLabel:            \"blackbox\",\n1034: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeIntervalLabel: \"30s\",\n1035: \t\t\t\tmodel.ScrapeTimeoutLabel:  \"15s\",\n1036: \t\t\t},\n1037: \t\t\tParams: url.Values{},\n1038: \t\t\tActive: false,\n1039: \t\t},\n1040: \t}\n1041: \n1042: \treturn newTestTargetRetriever(targets)\n1043: }\n1044: \n1045: func setupRemote(s storage.Storage) *httptest.Server {\n1046: \thandler := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1047: \t\treq, err := remote.DecodeReadRequest(r)\n1048: \t\tif err != nil {\n1049: \t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\n1050: \t\t\treturn\n1051: \t\t}\n1052: \t\tresp := prompb.ReadResponse{\n1053: \t\t\tResults: make([]*prompb.QueryResult, len(req.Queries)),\n1054: \t\t}\n1055: \t\tfor i, query := range req.Queries {\n1056: \t\t\tmatchers, err := remote.FromLabelMatchers(query.Matchers)\n1057: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1058: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\n1059: \t\t\t\treturn\n1060: \t\t\t}\n1061: \n1062: \t\t\tvar hints *storage.SelectHints\n1063: \t\t\tif query.Hints != nil {\n1064: \t\t\t\thints = &storage.SelectHints{\n1065: \t\t\t\t\tStart: query.Hints.StartMs,\n1066: \t\t\t\t\tEnd:   query.Hints.EndMs,\n1067: \t\t\t\t\tStep:  query.Hints.StepMs,\n1068: \t\t\t\t\tFunc:  query.Hints.Func,\n1069: \t\t\t\t}\n1070: \t\t\t}\n1071: \n1072: \t\t\tquerier, err := s.Querier(query.StartTimestampMs, query.EndTimestampMs)\n1073: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1074: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1075: \t\t\t\treturn\n1076: \t\t\t}\n1077: \t\t\tdefer querier.Close()\n1078: \n1079: \t\t\tset := querier.Select(r.Context(), false, hints, matchers...)\n1080: \t\t\tresp.Results[i], _, err = remote.ToQueryResult(set, 1e6)\n1081: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n1082: \t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1083: \t\t\t\treturn\n1084: \t\t\t}\n1085: \t\t}\n1086: \n1087: \t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-protobuf\")\n1088: \t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"snappy\")\n1089: \n1090: \t\tif err := remote.EncodeReadResponse(&resp, w); err != nil {\n1091: \t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1092: \t\t\treturn\n1093: \t\t}\n1094: \t})\n1095: \n1096: \treturn httptest.NewServer(handler)\n1097: }\n1098: \n1099: func testEndpoints(t *testing.T, api *API, tr *testTargetRetriever, es storage.ExemplarStorage, testLabelAPI bool) {\n1100: \tstart := time.Unix(0, 0)\n1101: \n1102: \ttype targetMetadata struct {\n1103: \t\tidentifier string\n1104: \t\tmetadata   []scrape.MetricMetadata\n1105: \t}\n1106: \n1107: \ttype test struct {\n1108: \t\tendpoint              apiFunc\n1109: \t\tparams                map[string]string\n1110: \t\tquery                 url.Values\n1111: \t\tresponse              any\n1112: \t\tresponseLen           int // If nonzero, check only the length; `response` is ignored.\n1113: \t\tresponseMetadataTotal int\n1114: \t\tresponseAsJSON        string\n1115: \t\twarningsCount         int\n1116: \t\terrType               errorType\n1117: \t\tsorter                func(any)\n1118: \t\tmetadata              []targetMetadata\n1119: \t\texemplars             []exemplar.QueryResult\n1120: \t\tzeroFunc              func(any)\n1121: \t}\n1122: \n1123: \trulesZeroFunc := func(i any) {\n1124: \t\tif i != nil {\n1125: \t\t\tv := i.(*RuleDiscovery)\n1126: \t\t\tfor _, ruleGroup := range v.RuleGroups {\n1127: \t\t\t\truleGroup.EvaluationTime = float64(0)\n1128: \t\t\t\truleGroup.LastEvaluation = time.Time{}\n1129: \t\t\t\tfor k, rule := range ruleGroup.Rules {\n1130: \t\t\t\t\tswitch r := rule.(type) {\n1131: \t\t\t\t\tcase AlertingRule:\n1132: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastEvaluation = time.Time{}\n1133: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.EvaluationTime = float64(0)\n1134: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastError = \"\"\n1135: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.Health = \"ok\"\n1136: \t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, alert := range r.Alerts {\n1137: \t\t\t\t\t\t\talert.ActiveAt = nil\n1138: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n1139: \t\t\t\t\t\truleGroup.Rules[k] = r\n1140: \t\t\t\t\tcase RecordingRule:\n1141: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastEvaluation = time.Time{}\n1142: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.EvaluationTime = float64(0)\n1143: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.LastError = \"\"\n1144: \t\t\t\t\t\tr.Health = \"ok\"\n1145: \t\t\t\t\t\truleGroup.Rules[k] = r\n1146: \t\t\t\t\t}\n1147: \t\t\t\t}\n1148: \t\t\t}\n1149: \t\t}\n1150: \t}\n1151: \n1152: \ttests := []test{\n1153: \t\t{\n1154: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1155: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1156: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1157: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1158: \t\t\t},\n1159: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1160: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1161: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1162: \t\t\t\t\tV: 2,\n1163: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123*time.Second + 400*time.Millisecond)),\n1164: \t\t\t\t},\n1165: \t\t\t},\n1166: \t\t},\n1167: \t\t// Only matrix and vector responses are limited/truncated. String and scalar responses aren't truncated.\n1168: \t\t{\n1169: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1170: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1171: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1172: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1173: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"1\"},\n1174: \t\t\t},\n1175: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1176: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1177: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1178: \t\t\t\t\tV: 2,\n1179: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123*time.Second + 400*time.Millisecond)),\n1180: \t\t\t\t},\n1181: \t\t\t},\n1182: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1183: \t\t},\n1184: \t\t// When limit = 0, limit is disabled.\n1185: \t\t{\n1186: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1187: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1188: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1189: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1190: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"0\"},\n1191: \t\t\t},\n1192: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1193: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1194: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1195: \t\t\t\t\tV: 2,\n1196: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123*time.Second + 400*time.Millisecond)),\n1197: \t\t\t\t},\n1198: \t\t\t},\n1199: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1200: \t\t},\n1201: \t\t{\n1202: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1203: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1204: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"2\"},\n1205: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1206: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"-1\"},\n1207: \t\t\t},\n1208: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1209: \t\t},\n1210: \t\t{\n1211: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1212: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1213: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"0.333\"},\n1214: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"1970-01-01T00:02:03Z\"},\n1215: \t\t\t},\n1216: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1217: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1218: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1219: \t\t\t\t\tV: 0.333,\n1220: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123 * time.Second)),\n1221: \t\t\t\t},\n1222: \t\t\t},\n1223: \t\t},\n1224: \t\t{\n1225: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1226: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1227: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"0.333\"},\n1228: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"1970-01-01T01:02:03+01:00\"},\n1229: \t\t\t},\n1230: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1231: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1232: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1233: \t\t\t\t\tV: 0.333,\n1234: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(123 * time.Second)),\n1235: \t\t\t\t},\n1236: \t\t\t},\n1237: \t\t},\n1238: \t\t{\n1239: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1240: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1241: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"0.333\"},\n1242: \t\t\t},\n1243: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1244: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeScalar,\n1245: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Scalar{\n1246: \t\t\t\t\tV: 0.333,\n1247: \t\t\t\t\tT: timestamp.FromTime(api.now()),\n1248: \t\t\t\t},\n1249: \t\t\t},\n1250: \t\t},\n1251: \t\t{\n1252: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1253: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1254: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1255: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1256: \t\t\t\t},\n1257: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1258: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"2\"},\n1259: \t\t\t},\n1260: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1261: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\n1262: \t\t\"resultType\": \"vector\",\n1263: \t\t\"result\": [\n1264: \t\t\t{\n1265: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1266: \t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\"\n1267: \t\t\t\t},\n1268: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"42\"]\n1269: \t\t\t},\n1270: \t\t\t{\n1271: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1272: \t\t\t\t\t\"dings\": \"bums\"\n1273: \t\t\t\t},\n1274: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"3.1415\"]\n1275: \t\t\t}\n1276: \t\t]\n1277: \t}`,\n1278: \t\t},\n1279: \t\t{\n1280: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1281: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1282: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1283: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1284: \t\t\t\t},\n1285: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1286: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"1\"},\n1287: \t\t\t},\n1288: \t\t\twarningsCount: 1,\n1289: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\n1290: \t\t\"resultType\": \"vector\",\n1291: \t\t\"result\": [\n1292: \t\t\t{\n1293: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1294: \t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\"\n1295: \t\t\t\t},\n1296: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"42\"]\n1297: \t\t\t}\n1298: \t\t]\n1299: \t}`,\n1300: \t\t},\n1301: \t\t{\n1302: \t\t\tendpoint: api.query,\n1303: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1304: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1305: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1306: \t\t\t\t},\n1307: \t\t\t\t\"time\":  []string{\"123.4\"},\n1308: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"0\"},\n1309: \t\t\t},\n1310: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\n1311: \t\t\"resultType\": \"vector\",\n1312: \t\t\"result\": [\n1313: \t\t\t{\n1314: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1315: \t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\"\n1316: \t\t\t\t},\n1317: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"42\"]\n1318: \t\t\t},\n1319: \t\t\t{\n1320: \t\t\t\t\"metric\": {\n1321: \t\t\t\t\t\"dings\": \"bums\"\n1322: \t\t\t\t},\n1323: \t\t\t\t\"value\": [123.4, \"3.1415\"]\n1324: \t\t\t}\n1325: \t\t]\n1326: \t}`,\n1327: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0,\n1328: \t\t},\n1329: \t\t// limit=0 means no limit.\n1330: \t\t{\n1331: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1332: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1333: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\n1334: \t\t\t\t\t`label_replace(vector(42), \"foo\", \"bar\", \"\", \"\") or label_replace(vector(3.1415), \"dings\", \"bums\", \"\", \"\")`,\n1335: \t\t\t\t},\n1336: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"0\"},\n1337: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"2\"},\n1338: \t\t\t\t\"step\":  []string{\"1\"},\n1339: \t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"0\"},\n1340: \t\t\t},\n1341: \t\t\tresponse: &QueryData{\n1342: \t\t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeMatrix,\n1343: \t\t\t\tResult: promql.Matrix{\n1344: \t\t\t\t\tpromql.Series{\n1345: \t\t\t\t\t\tMetric: labels.FromMap(map[string]string{\"dings\": \"bums\"}),\n1346: \t\t\t\t\t\tFloats: []promql.FPoint{\n1347: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t{F: 3.1415, T: timestamp.FromTime(start)},\n1348: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t{F: 3.1415, T: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(1 * time.Second))},\n1349: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t{F: 3.1415, T: timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(2 * time.Second))},\n1350: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n1351: \t\t\t\t\"step\":  []string{\"1\"},\n1519: \t\t\t},\n1520: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1521: \t\t},\n1522: \t\t// Invalid step.\n1523: \t\t{\n1524: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1525: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1526: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"time()\"},\n1527: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"1\"},\n1528: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"2\"},\n1529: \t\t\t\t\"step\": url.Values{\n1537: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"time()\"},\n1538: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"2\"},\n1539: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"1\"},\n1540: \t\t\t\t\"step\":  []string{\"1\"},\n1541: \t\t\t},\n1542: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1543: \t\t},\n1544: \t\t// Start overflows int64 internally.\n1545: \t\t{\n1546: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryRange,\n1547: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1548: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"time()\"},\n1549: \t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"148966367200.372\"},\n1550: \t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"1489667272.372\"},\n1551: \t\t\t\t\"step\": []string{\"foo+bar\"},\n1559: \t\t\t},\n1560: \t\t\tresponse: \"foo + bar\",\n1561: \t\t},\n1562: \t\t{\n1563: \t\t\tendpoint: api.formatQuery,\n1564: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1565: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{\"invalid_expression/\"},\n1566: \t\t\t},\n1567: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n1568: \t\t},\n1569: \t\t{\n1570: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1571: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1572: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1573: \t\t\t},\n1574: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1575: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1576: \t\t\t},\n1577: \t\t},\n1578: \t\t{\n1579: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1580: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1581: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`{foo=\"\"}`},\n1582: \t\t\t},\n1583: \t\t\t},\n1590: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1591: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric1\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1592: \t\t\t},\n1593: \t\t},\n1594: \t\t{\n1595: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1596: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1597: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=~\".+o$\"}`, `test_metric1{foo=~\".+o\"}`},\n1598: \t\t\t},\n1599: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1600: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric1\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1601: \t\t\t},\n1602: \t\t},\n1603: \t\t// Try to overlap the selected series set as much as possible to test the result de-duplication works well.\n1604: \t\t{\n1605: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1606: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1607: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric4{foo=~\".+o$\"}`, `test_metric4{dup=~\"^1\"}`},\n1608: \t\t\t},\n1609: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1610: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"dup\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1613: \t\t\t},\n1614: \t\t},\n1615: \t\t{\n1616: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1617: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1618: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=~\".+o\"}`, `none`},\n1619: \t\t\t},\n1620: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1621: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric1\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1622: \t\t\t},\n1623: \t\t},\n1624: \t\t// Start and end before series starts.\n1625: \t\t{\n1626: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1627: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1628: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1629: \t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"-2\"},\n1630: \t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"-1\"},\n1631: \t\t\t},\n1632: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{},\n1633: \t\t},\n1634: \t\t// Start and end after series ends.\n1635: \t\t{\n1636: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1637: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1638: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1639: \t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"100000\"},\n1640: \t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"100001\"},\n1641: \t\t\t},\n1642: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{},\n1643: \t\t},\n1644: \t\t// Start before series starts, end after series ends.\n1645: \t\t{\n1646: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1647: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1648: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1649: \t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"-1\"},\n1650: \t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"100000\"},\n1651: \t\t\t},\n1652: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1653: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1654: \t\t\t},\n1655: \t\t},\n1656: \t\t// Start and end within series.\n1657: \t\t{\n1658: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1659: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1660: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1661: \t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"1\"},\n1662: \t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"100\"},\n1663: \t\t\t},\n1664: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1665: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1666: \t\t\t},\n1667: \t\t},\n1668: \t\t// Start within series, end after.\n1669: \t\t{\n1670: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1671: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1672: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1673: \t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"1\"},\n1674: \t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"100000\"},\n1675: \t\t\t},\n1676: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1677: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1678: \t\t\t},\n1679: \t\t},\n1680: \t\t// Start before series, end within series.\n1681: \t\t{\n1682: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1683: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1684: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n1685: \t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"-1\"},\n1686: \t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"1\"},\n1687: \t\t\t},\n1688: \t\t\tresponse: []labels.Labels{\n1689: \t\t\t\tlabels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric2\", \"foo\", \"boo\"),\n1690: \t\t\t},\n1691: \t\t},\n1692: \t\t// Series request with limit.\n1693: \t\t{\n1694: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1695: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1696: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{\"test_metric1\"},\n1697: \t\t\t\t\"limit\":   []string{\"1\"},\n1698: \t\t\t},\n1699: \t\t\tresponseLen:   1, // API does not specify which particular value will come back.\n1700: \t\t\twarningsCount: 1,\n1701: \t\t},\n1702: \t\t{\n1703: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1704: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1705: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{\"test_metric1\"},\n1706: \t\t\t\t\"limit\":   []string{\"2\"},\n1707: \t\t\t},\n1708: \t\t\tresponseLen:   2, // API does not specify which particular value will come back.\n1709: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0, // No warnings if limit isn't exceeded.\n1710: \t\t},\n1711: \t\t{\n1712: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1713: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n1714: \t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{\"test_metric1\"},\n1715: \t\t\t\t\"limit\":   []string{\"0\"},\n1716: \t\t\t},\n1717: \t\t\tresponseLen:   2, // API does not specify which particular value will come back.\n1718: \t\t\twarningsCount: 0, // No warnings if limit isn't exceeded.\n1719: \t\t},\n1720: \t\t// Missing match[] query params in series requests.\n1721: \t\t{\n1722: \t\t\tendpoint: api.series,\n1723: \t\t\terrType:  errorBadData,\n1724: \t\t},\n1725: \t\t{\n1726: \t\t\tendpoint: api.dropSeries,\n1727: \t\t\terrType:  errorInternal,\n1728: \t\t},\n1729: \t\t{\n1730: \t\t\tendpoint: api.targets,\n1731: \t\t\tresponse: &TargetDiscovery{\n1732: \t\t\t\tActiveTargets: []*Target{\n1733: \t\t\t\t\t{\n1734: \t\t\t\t\t\tDiscoveredLabels:   labels.FromStrings(\"__param_target\", \"example.com\", \"__scrape_interval__\", \"0s\", \"__scrape_timeout__\", \"0s\"),\n1735: \t\t\t\t\t\tLabels:             labels.FromStrings(\"job\", \"blackbox\"),\n1736: \t\t\t\t\t\tScrapePool:         \"blackbox\",\n1737: \t\t\t\t\t\tScrapeURL:          \"http://localhost:9115/probe?target=example.com\",\n1738: \t\t\t\t\t\tGlobalURL: \t\t\t\t\t\tLastScrape:         scrapeStart,\n1742: \t\t\t\t\t\tLastScrapeDuration: 0.1,\n1743: \t\t\t\t\t\tScrapeInterval:     \"20s\",\n1744: \t\t\t\t\t\tScrapeTimeout:      \"10s\",\n1745: \t\t\t\t\t},\n1746: \t\t\t\t\t{\n1747: \t\t\t\t\t\tDiscoveredLabels:   labels.FromStrings(\"__scrape_interval__\", \"0s\", \"__scrape_timeout__\", \"0s\"),\n1748: \t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: \t\t\t\t},\n2119: \t\t\t},\n2120: \t\t\tresponseAsJSON: `{\"go_threads\": [{\"type\":\"gauge\",\"unit\":\"\",\n2121: \"help\":\"Number of OS threads \t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"abc\"),\n3156: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n3157: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(2 * time.Second)),\n3158: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n3159: \t\t\t\t\t},\n3160: \t\t\t\t},\n3161: \t\t\t\t{\n3162: \t\t\t\t\tSeriesLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", \"test_metric4\", \"foo\", \"bar\", \"dup\", \"1\"),\n3163: \t\t\t\t\tExemplars: []exemplar.Exemplar{\n3164: \t\t\t\t\t\t{\n3165: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabels: labels.FromStrings(\"id\", \"lul\"),\n3166: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:  10,\n3167: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tTs:     timestamp.FromTime(start.Add(4 * time.Second)),\n3168: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n3169: \t\t\t\t\t},\n3170: \t\t\t\t},\n3171: \t\t\t},\n3172: \t\t},\n3173: \t\t{\n3174: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryExemplars,\n3175: \t\t\tquery: \t\t\t\t\t\t},\n3189: \t\t\t\t\t},\n3190: \t\t\t\t},\n3191: \t\t\t},\n3192: \t\t},\n3193: \t\t{\n3194: \t\t\tendpoint: api.queryExemplars,\n3195: \t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3196: \t\t\t\t\"query\": url.Values{\n3219: \t\t\t\t\"query\": []string{`{__name__=\"test_metric5\"}`},\n3220: \t\t\t},\n3221: \t\t\tresponse: []exemplar.QueryResult{},\n3222: \t\t},\n3223: \t}\n3224: \n3225: \tif testLabelAPI {\n3226: \t\ttests = append(tests, []test{\n3227: \t\t\t{\n3228: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3229: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3230: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \t\t\t\t\t\"test_metric4\",\n3237: \t\t\t\t\t\"test_metric5\",\n3238: \t\t\t\t},\n3239: \t\t\t},\n3240: \t\t\t{\n3241: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3242: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3243: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3244: \t\t\t\t},\n3245: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3246: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3247: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3248: \t\t\t\t},\n3249: \t\t\t},\n3250: \t\t\t// Bad name parameter\n3251: \t\t\t{\n3252: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3253: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3254: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"host.name\\xff\",\n3255: \t\t\t\t},\n3256: \t\t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3257: \t\t\t},\n3258: \t\t\t// Valid utf8 name parameter for utf8 validation.\n3259: \t\t\t{\n3260: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3261: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3262: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"host.name\",\n3263: \t\t\t\t},\n3264: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3265: \t\t\t\t\t\"localhost\",\n3266: \t\t\t\t},\n3267: \t\t\t},\n3268: \t\t\t// Valid escaped utf8 name parameter for utf8 validation.\n3269: \t\t\t{\n3270: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3271: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3272: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": url.Values{\n3285: \t\t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"-2\"},\n3286: \t\t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"-1\"},\n3287: \t\t\t\t},\n3288: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{},\n3289: \t\t\t},\n3290: \t\t\t// Start and url.Values{\n3297: \t\t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"1\"},\n3298: \t\t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"100\"},\n3299: \t\t\t\t},\n3300: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3301: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3302: provide end within LabelValues, don't provide a start time.\n3389: \t\t\t{\n3390: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3391: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3392: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3400: \t\t\t\t},\n3401: \t\t\t},\n3402: \t\t\t// Label values with bad matchers.\n3403: \t\t\t{\n3404: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3405: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3406: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3407: \t\t\t\t},\n3408: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3409: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`{foo=\"\"`, `test_metric2`},\n3410: \t\t\t\t},\n3411: \t\t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3412: \t\t\t},\n3413: \t\t\t// Label values with empty matchers.\n3414: \t\t\t{\n3415: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3416: \t\t\t\tparams: \t\t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3423: \t\t\t},\n3424: \t\t\t// Label values with matcher.\n3425: \t\t\t{\n3426: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3427: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3428: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3429: \t\t\t\t},\n3430: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3431: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n3432: \t\t\t\t},\n3433: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3434: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3435: \t\t\t\t},\n3436: \t\t\t},\n3437: \t\t\t// Label values with matcher.\n3438: \t\t\t{\n3439: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3440: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3441: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3442: \t\t\t\t},\n3443: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3444: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1`},\n3445: \t\t\t\t},\n3446: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3447: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3448: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3449: \t\t\t\t},\n3450: \t\t\t},\n3451: \t\t\t// Label values with matcher using label filter.\n3452: \t\t\t{\n3453: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3454: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3455: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3456: \t\t\t\t},\n3457: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3458: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=\"bar\"}`},\n3459: \t\t\t\t},\n3460: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3461: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3462: \t\t\t\t},\n3463: \t\t\t},\n3464: \t\t\t// Label values with matcher and url.Values{\n3471: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1`},\n3472: \t\t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"1\"},\n3473: \t\t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"100000000\"},\n3474: \t\t\t\t},\n3475: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3476: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3477: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3478: \t\t\t\t},\n3479: \t\t\t},\n3480: \t\t\t// Try to overlap the selected series set as much as possible to test that the value de-duplication works.\n3481: \t\t\t{\n3482: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3483: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3484: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3485: \t\t\t\t},\n3486: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3487: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric4{dup=~\"^1\"}`, `test_metric4{foo=~\".+o$\"}`},\n3488: \t\t\t\t},\n3489: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\n3490: \t\t\t\t\t\"bar\",\n3491: \t\t\t\t\t\"boo\",\n3492: \t\t\t\t},\n3493: \t\t\t},\n3494: \t\t\t// Label values with limit.\n3495: \t\t\t{\n3496: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3497: \t\t\t\tparams: \t\t\t\tresponseLen:   2, // API does not specify which particular values will come back.\n3504: \t\t\t\twarningsCount: 1,\n3505: \t\t\t},\n3506: \t\t\t{\n3507: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelValues,\n3508: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3509: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"__name__\",\n3510: \t\t\t\t},\n3511: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3512: \t\t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"5\"},\n3513: \t\t\t\t},\n3514: \t\t\t\tresponseLen:   5, // API does not specify which particular values will come back.\n3515: \t\t\t\twarningsCount: 0, // No warnings if limit isn't
