\t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3580: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3581: \t\t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"148966367200.372\"},\n3582: \t\t\t\t\t\"end\":   []string{\"148966367200.972\"},\n3583: \t\t\t\t},\n3584: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{},\n3585: \t\t\t},\n3586: \t\t\t// Only provide Start within Label names, don't provide an end time.\n3587: \t\t\t{\n3588: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3589: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3590: \t\t\t\t\t\"start\": []string{\"4\"},\n3591: \t\t\t\t},\n3592: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\"__name__\", \"dup\", \"foo\", \"host.name\", \"junk\\n{},=:  chars\"},\n3593: \t\t\t},\n3594: \t\t\t// Only provide End within Label names, don't provide a start time.\n3595: \t\t\t{\n3596: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3597: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3598: \t\t\t\t\t\"end\": []string{\"20\"},\n3599: \t\t\t\t},\n3600: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\"__name__\", \"dup\", \"foo\", \"host.name\", \"junk\\n{},=:  chars\"},\n3601: \t\t\t},\n3602: \t\t\t// Label names with bad matchers.\n3603: \t\t\t{\n3604: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3605: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3606: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`{foo=\"\"`, `test_metric2`},\n3607: \t\t\t\t},\n3608: \t\t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3609: \t\t\t},\n3610: \t\t\t// Label values with empty matchers.\n3611: \t\t\t{\n3612: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3613: \t\t\t\tparams: map[string]string{\n3614: \t\t\t\t\t\"name\": \"foo\",\n3615: \t\t\t\t},\n3616: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3617: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`{foo=\"\"}`},\n3618: \t\t\t\t},\n3619: \t\t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3620: \t\t\t},\n3621: \t\t\t// Label names with matcher.\n3622: \t\t\t{\n3623: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3624: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3625: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n3626: \t\t\t\t},\n3627: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\"__name__\", \"foo\"},\n3628: \t\t\t},\n3629: \t\t\t// Label names with matcher.\n3630: \t\t\t{\n3631: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3632: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3633: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric3`},\n3634: \t\t\t\t},\n3635: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\"__name__\", \"dup\", \"foo\"},\n3636: \t\t\t},\n3637: \t\t\t// Label names with matcher using label filter.\n3638: \t\t\t// There is no matching series.\n3639: \t\t\t{\n3640: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3641: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3642: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric1{foo=\"test\"}`},\n3643: \t\t\t\t},\n3644: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{},\n3645: \t\t\t},\n3646: \t\t\t// Label names with matcher and time range.\n3647: \t\t\t{\n3648: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3649: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3650: \t\t\t\t\t\"match[]\": []string{`test_metric2`},\n3651: \t\t\t\t\t\"start\":   []string{\"1\"},\n3652: \t\t\t\t\t\"end\":     []string{\"100000000\"},\n3653: \t\t\t\t},\n3654: \t\t\t\tresponse: []string{\"__name__\", \"foo\"},\n3655: \t\t\t},\n3656: \t\t\t// Label names with limit.\n3657: \t\t\t{\n3658: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3659: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3660: \t\t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"2\"},\n3661: \t\t\t\t},\n3662: \t\t\t\tresponseLen:   2, // API does not specify which particular values will come back.\n3663: \t\t\t\twarningsCount: 1,\n3664: \t\t\t},\n3665: \t\t\t{\n3666: \t\t\t\tendpoint: api.labelNames,\n3667: \t\t\t\tquery: url.Values{\n3668: \t\t\t\t\t\"limit\": []string{\"5\"},\n3669: \t\t\t\t},\n3670: \t\t\t\tresponseLen:   5, // API does not specify which particular values will come back.\n3671: \t\t\t\twarningsCount: 0, // No warnings if limit isn't exceeded.\n3672: \t\t\t},\n3673: \t\t}...)\n3674: \t}\n3675: \n3676: \tmethods := func(f apiFunc) []string {\n3677: \t\tfp := reflect.ValueOf(f).Pointer()\n3678: \t\tif fp == reflect.ValueOf(api.query).Pointer() || fp == reflect.ValueOf(api.queryRange).Pointer() || fp == reflect.ValueOf(api.series).Pointer() {\n3679: \t\t\treturn []string{http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost}\n3680: \t\t}\n3681: \t\treturn []string{http.MethodGet}\n3682: \t}\n3683: \n3684: \trequest := func(m string, q url.Values) (*http.Request, error) {\n3685: \t\tif m == http.MethodPost {\n3686: \t\t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(m, \"http://example.com\", strings.NewReader(q.Encode()))\n3687: \t\t\tr.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\")\n3688: \t\t\tr.RemoteAddr = \"127.0.0.1:20201\"\n3689: \t\t\treturn r, err\n3690: \t\t}\n3691: \t\tr, err := http.NewRequest(m, fmt.Sprintf(\"http://example.com?%s\", q.Encode()), nil)\n3692: \t\tr.RemoteAddr = \"127.0.0.1:20201\"\n3693: \t\treturn r, err\n3694: \t}\n3695: \n3696: \tfor i, test := range tests {\n3697: \t\tt.Run(fmt.Sprintf(\"run %d %s %q\", i, describeAPIFunc(test.endpoint), test.query.Encode()), func(t *testing.T) {\n3698: \t\t\tfor _, method := range methods(test.endpoint) {\n3699: \t\t\t\tt.Run(method, func(t *testing.T) {\n3700: \t\t\t\t\t// Build a context with the correct request params.\n3701: \t\t\t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n3702: \t\t\t\t\tfor p, v := range test.params {\n3703: \t\t\t\t\t\tctx = route.WithParam(ctx, p, v) //nolint:fatcontext // This is intentional to provide the route params.\n3704: \t\t\t\t\t}\n3705: \n3706: \t\t\t\t\treq, err := request(method, test.query)\n3707: \t\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n3708: \n3709: \t\t\t\t\ttr.ResetMetadataStore()\n3710: \t\t\t\t\tfor _, tm := range test.metadata {\n3711: \t\t\t\t\t\ttr.SetMetadataStoreForTargets(tm.identifier, &testMetaStore{Metadata: tm.metadata})\n3712: \t\t\t\t\t}\n3713: \n3714: \t\t\t\t\tfor _, te := range test.exemplars {\n3715: \t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, e := range te.Exemplars {\n3716: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t_, err := es.AppendExemplar(0, te.SeriesLabels, e)\n3717: \t\t\t\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n3718: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n3719: \t\t\t\t\t}\n3720: \n3721: \t\t\t\t\tres := test.endpoint(req.WithContext(ctx))\n3722: \t\t\t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, test.errType)\n3723: \n3724: \t\t\t\t\tif test.sorter != nil {\n3725: \t\t\t\t\t\ttest.sorter(res.data)\n3726: \t\t\t\t\t}\n3727: \n3728: \t\t\t\t\tif test.responseLen != 0 {\n3729: \t\t\t\t\t\tassertAPIResponseLength(t, res.data, test.responseLen)\n3730: \t\t\t\t\t\tif test.responseMetadataTotal != 0 {\n3731: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tassertAPIResponseMetadataLen(t, res.data, test.responseMetadataTotal)\n3732: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n3733: \t\t\t\t\t} else {\n3734: \t\t\t\t\t\tif test.zeroFunc != nil {\n3735: \t\t\t\t\t\t\ttest.zeroFunc(res.data)\n3736: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n3737: \t\t\t\t\t\tif test.response != nil {\n3738: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tassertAPIResponse(t, res.data, test.response)\n3739: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n3740: \t\t\t\t\t}\n3741: \n3742: \t\t\t\t\tif test.responseAsJSON != \"\" {\n3743: \t\t\t\t\t\tjson := jsoniter.ConfigCompatibleWithStandardLibrary\n3744: \t\t\t\t\t\ts, err := json.Marshal(res.data)\n3745: \t\t\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n3746: \t\t\t\t\t\trequire.JSONEq(t, test.responseAsJSON, string(s))\n3747: \t\t\t\t\t}\n3748: \n3749: \t\t\t\t\trequire.Len(t, res.warnings, test.warningsCount)\n3750: \t\t\t\t})\n3751: \t\t\t}\n3752: \t\t})\n3753: \t}\n3754: }\n3755: \n3756: func describeAPIFunc(f apiFunc) string {\n3757: \tname := runtime.FuncForPC(reflect.ValueOf(f).Pointer()).Name()\n3758: \treturn strings.Split(name[strings.LastIndex(name, \".\")+1:], \"-\")[0]\n3759: }\n3760: \n3761: func assertAPIError(t *testing.T, got *apiError, exp errorType) {\n3762: \tt.Helper()\n3763: \n3764: \tif exp.num == ErrorNone {\n3765: \t\trequire.Nil(t, got)\n3766: \t} else {\n3767: \t\trequire.NotNil(t, got)\n3768: \t\trequire.Equal(t, exp, got.typ, \"(%q)\", got)\n3769: \t}\n3770: }\n3771: \n3772: func assertAPIResponse(t *testing.T, got, exp any) {\n3773: \tt.Helper()\n3774: \n3775: \ttestutil.RequireEqual(t, exp, got)\n3776: }\n3777: \n3778: func assertAPIResponseLength(t *testing.T, got any, expLen int) {\n3779: \tt.Helper()\n3780: \n3781: \tgotLen := reflect.ValueOf(got).Len()\n3782: \trequire.Equal(t, expLen, gotLen, \"Response length does not match\")\n3783: }\n3784: \n3785: func assertAPIResponseMetadataLen(t *testing.T, got any, expLen int) {\n3786: \tt.Helper()\n3787: \n3788: \tvar gotLen int\n3789: \tresponse := got.(map[string][]metadata.Metadata)\n3790: \tfor _, m := range response {\n3791: \t\tgotLen += len(m)\n3792: \t}\n3793: \n3794: \trequire.Equal(t, expLen, gotLen, \"Amount of metadata in the response does not match\")\n3795: }\n3796: \n3797: type fakeDB struct {\n3798: \terr        error\n3799: \tblockMetas []tsdb.BlockMeta\n3800: }\n3801: \n3802: func (f *fakeDB) CleanTombstones() error { return f.err }\n3803: \n3804: func (f *fakeDB) BlockMetas() ([]tsdb.BlockMeta, error) {\n3805: \treturn f.blockMetas, nil\n3806: }\n3807: func (f *fakeDB) Delete(context.Context, int64, int64, ...*labels.Matcher) error { return f.err }\n3808: func (f *fakeDB) Snapshot(string, bool) error                                    { return f.err }\n3809: func (*fakeDB) Stats(statsByLabelName string, limit int) (_ *tsdb.Stats, retErr error) {\n3810: \tdbDir, err := os.MkdirTemp(\"\", \"tsdb-api-ready\")\n3811: \tif err != nil {\n3812: \t\treturn nil, err\n3813: \t}\n3814: \tdefer func() {\n3815: \t\terr := os.RemoveAll(dbDir)\n3816: \t\tif retErr != nil {\n3817: \t\t\tretErr = err\n3818: \t\t}\n3819: \t}()\n3820: \topts := tsdb.DefaultHeadOptions()\n3821: \topts.ChunkRange = 1000\n3822: \th, _ := tsdb.NewHead(nil, nil, nil, nil, opts, nil)\n3823: \treturn h.Stats(statsByLabelName, limit), nil\n3824: }\n3825: \n3826: func (*fakeDB) WALReplayStatus() (tsdb.WALReplayStatus, error) {\n3827: \treturn tsdb.WALReplayStatus{}, nil\n3828: }\n3829: \n3830: func TestAdminEndpoints(t *testing.T) {\n3831: \ttsdb, tsdbWithError, tsdbNotReady := &fakeDB{}, &fakeDB{err: errors.New(\"some error\")}, &fakeDB{err: fmt.Errorf(\"wrap: %w\", tsdb.ErrNotReady)}\n3832: \tsnapshotAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.snapshot }\n3833: \tcleanAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.cleanTombstones }\n3834: \tdeleteAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.deleteSeries }\n3835: \n3836: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n3837: \t\tdb          *fakeDB\n3838: \t\tenableAdmin bool\n3839: \t\tendpoint    func(api *API) apiFunc\n3840: \t\tmethod      string\n3841: \t\tvalues      url.Values\n3842: \n3843: \t\terrType errorType\n3844: \t}{\n3845: \t\t// Tests for the snapshot endpoint.\n3846: \t\t{\n3847: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3848: \t\t\tenableAdmin: false,\n3849: \t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n3850: \n3851: \t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n3852: \t\t},\n3853: \t\t{\n3854: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3855: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3856: \t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n3857: \n3858: \t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n3859: \t\t},\n3860: \t\t{\n3861: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3862: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3863: \t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n3864: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"skip_head\": {\"true\"}},\n3865: \n3866: \t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n3867: \t\t},\n3868: \t\t{\n3869: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3870: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3871: \t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n3872: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"skip_head\": {\"xxx\"}},\n3873: \n3874: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3875: \t\t},\n3876: \t\t{\n3877: \t\t\tdb:          tsdbWithError,\n3878: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3879: \t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n3880: \n3881: \t\t\terrType: errorInternal,\n3882: \t\t},\n3883: \t\t{\n3884: \t\t\tdb:          tsdbNotReady,\n3885: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3886: \t\t\tendpoint:    snapshotAPI,\n3887: \n3888: \t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n3889: \t\t},\n3890: \t\t// Tests for the cleanTombstones endpoint.\n3891: \t\t{\n3892: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3893: \t\t\tenableAdmin: false,\n3894: \t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n3895: \n3896: \t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n3897: \t\t},\n3898: \t\t{\n3899: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3900: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3901: \t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n3902: \n3903: \t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n3904: \t\t},\n3905: \t\t{\n3906: \t\t\tdb:          tsdbWithError,\n3907: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3908: \t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n3909: \n3910: \t\t\terrType: errorInternal,\n3911: \t\t},\n3912: \t\t{\n3913: \t\t\tdb:          tsdbNotReady,\n3914: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3915: \t\t\tendpoint:    cleanAPI,\n3916: \n3917: \t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n3918: \t\t},\n3919: \t\t// Tests for the deleteSeries endpoint.\n3920: \t\t{\n3921: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3922: \t\t\tenableAdmin: false,\n3923: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3924: \n3925: \t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n3926: \t\t},\n3927: \t\t{\n3928: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3929: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3930: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3931: \n3932: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3933: \t\t},\n3934: \t\t{\n3935: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3936: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3937: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3938: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"123\"}},\n3939: \n3940: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3941: \t\t},\n3942: \t\t{\n3943: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3944: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3945: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3946: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}, \"start\": {\"xxx\"}},\n3947: \n3948: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3949: \t\t},\n3950: \t\t{\n3951: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3952: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3953: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3954: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}, \"end\": {\"xxx\"}},\n3955: \n3956: \t\t\terrType: errorBadData,\n3957: \t\t},\n3958: \t\t{\n3959: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3960: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3961: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3962: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}},\n3963: \n3964: \t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n3965: \t\t},\n3966: \t\t{\n3967: \t\t\tdb:          tsdb,\n3968: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3969: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3970: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up{job!=\\\"foo\\\"}\", \"{job=~\\\"bar.+\\\"}\", \"up{instance!~\\\"fred.+\\\"}\"}},\n3971: \n3972: \t\t\terrType: errorNone,\n3973: \t\t},\n3974: \t\t{\n3975: \t\t\tdb:          tsdbWithError,\n3976: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3977: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3978: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}},\n3979: \n3980: \t\t\terrType: errorInternal,\n3981: \t\t},\n3982: \t\t{\n3983: \t\t\tdb:          tsdbNotReady,\n3984: \t\t\tenableAdmin: true,\n3985: \t\t\tendpoint:    deleteAPI,\n3986: \t\t\tvalues:      map[string][]string{\"match[]\": {\"up\"}},\n3987: \n3988: \t\t\terrType: errorUnavailable,\n3989: \t\t},\n3990: \t} {\n3991: \t\tt.Run(\"\", func(t *testing.T) {\n3992: \t\t\tdir := t.TempDir()\n3993: \n3994: \t\t\tapi := &API{\n3995: \t\t\t\tdb:          tc.db,\n3996: \t\t\t\tdbDir:       dir,\n3997: \t\t\t\tready:       func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n3998: \t\t\t\tenableAdmin: tc.enableAdmin,\n3999: \t\t\t}\n4000: \n4001: \t\t\tendpoint := tc.endpoint(api)\n4002: \t\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(tc.method, fmt.Sprintf(\"?%s\", tc.values.Encode()), nil)\n4003: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4004: \n4005: \t\t\tres := setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(endpoint(req))\n4006: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.errType)\n4007: \t\t})\n4008: \t}\n4009: }\n4010: \n4011: func TestRespondSuccess(t *testing.T) {\n4012: \tapi := API{\n4013: \t\tlogger: promslog.NewNopLogger(),\n4014: \t}\n4015: \n4016: \tapi.ClearCodecs()\n4017: \tapi.InstallCodec(JSONCodec{})\n4018: \tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"test\", \"cannot-encode\"}, canEncode: false})\n4019: \tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"test\", \"can-encode\"}, canEncode: true})\n4020: \tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"test\", \"can-encode-2\"}, canEncode: true})\n4021: \n4022: \ts := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n4023: \t\tapi.respond(w, r, \"test\", nil, \"\")\n4024: \t}))\n4025: \tdefer s.Close()\n4026: \n4027: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n4028: \t\tname                string\n4029: \t\tacceptHeader        string\n4030: \t\texpectedContentType string\n4031: \t\texpectedBody        string\n4032: \t}{\n4033: \t\t{\n4034: \t\t\tname:                \"no Accept header\",\n4035: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"application/json\",\n4036: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `{\"status\":\"success\",\"data\":\"test\"}`,\n4037: \t\t},\n4038: \t\t{\n4039: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with single content type which is suitable\",\n4040: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/can-encode\",\n4041: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"test/can-encode\",\n4042: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `response from test/can-encode codec`,\n4043: \t\t},\n4044: \t\t{\n4045: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with single content type which is not available\",\n4046: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/not-registered\",\n4047: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"application/json\",\n4048: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `{\"status\":\"success\",\"data\":\"test\"}`,\n4049: \t\t},\n4050: \t\t{\n4051: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with single content type which cannot encode the response payload\",\n4052: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/cannot-encode\",\n4053: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"application/json\",\n4054: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `{\"status\":\"success\",\"data\":\"test\"}`,\n4055: \t\t},\n4056: \t\t{\n4057: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with multiple content types, all of which are suitable\",\n4058: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/can-encode, test/can-encode-2\",\n4059: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"test/can-encode\",\n4060: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `response from test/can-encode codec`,\n4061: \t\t},\n4062: \t\t{\n4063: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with multiple content types, only one of which is available\",\n4064: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/not-registered, test/can-encode\",\n4065: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"test/can-encode\",\n4066: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `response from test/can-encode codec`,\n4067: \t\t},\n4068: \t\t{\n4069: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with multiple content types, only one of which can encode the response payload\",\n4070: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/cannot-encode, test/can-encode\",\n4071: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"test/can-encode\",\n4072: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `response from test/can-encode codec`,\n4073: \t\t},\n4074: \t\t{\n4075: \t\t\tname:                \"Accept header with multiple content types, none of which are available\",\n4076: \t\t\tacceptHeader:        \"test/not-registered, test/also-not-registered\",\n4077: \t\t\texpectedContentType: \"application/json\",\n4078: \t\t\texpectedBody:        `{\"status\":\"success\",\"data\":\"test\"}`,\n4079: \t\t},\n4080: \t} {\n4081: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n4082: \t\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, s.URL, nil)\n4083: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4084: \n4085: \t\t\tif tc.acceptHeader != \"\" {\n4086: \t\t\t\treq.Header.Set(\"Accept\", tc.acceptHeader)\n4087: \t\t\t}\n4088: \n4089: \t\t\tresp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)\n4090: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4091: \n4092: \t\t\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n4093: \t\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n4094: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4095: \n4096: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)\n4097: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, tc.expectedContentType, resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\"))\n4098: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, tc.expectedBody, string(body))\n4099: \t\t})\n4100: \t}\n4101: }\n4102: \n4103: func TestRespondSuccess_DefaultCodecCannotEncodeResponse(t *testing.T) {\n4104: \tapi := API{\n4105: \t\tlogger: promslog.NewNopLogger(),\n4106: \t}\n4107: \n4108: \tapi.ClearCodecs()\n4109: \tapi.InstallCodec(&testCodec{contentType: MIMEType{\"application\", \"default-format\"}, canEncode: false})\n4110: \n4111: \ts := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n4112: \t\tapi.respond(w, r, \"test\", nil, \"\")\n4113: \t}))\n4114: \tdefer s.Close()\n4115: \n4116: \treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, s.URL, nil)\n4117: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4118: \n4119: \tresp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)\n4120: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4121: \n4122: \tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n4123: \tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n4124: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4125: \n4126: \trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusNotAcceptable, resp.StatusCode)\n4127: \trequire.Equal(t, \"application/json\", resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\"))\n4128: \trequire.JSONEq(t, `{\"status\":\"error\",\"errorType\":\"not_acceptable\",\"error\":\"cannot encode response as application/default-format\"}`, string(body))\n4129: }\n4130: \n4131: func TestServeTSDBBlocks(t *testing.T) {\n4132: \tblockMeta := tsdb.BlockMeta{\n4133: \t\tULID:    ulid.MustNew(ulid.Now(), nil),\n4134: \t\tMinTime: 0,\n4135: \t\tMaxTime: 1000,\n4136: \t\tStats: tsdb.BlockStats{\n4137: \t\t\tNumSeries: 10,\n4138: \t\t},\n4139: \t}\n4140: \n4141: \tdb := &fakeDB{\n4142: \t\tblockMetas: []tsdb.BlockMeta{blockMeta},\n4143: \t}\n4144: \n4145: \tapi := &API{\n4146: \t\tdb: db,\n4147: \t}\n4148: \n4149: \treq := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, \"/api/v1/status/tsdb/blocks\", nil)\n4150: \tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n4151: \n4152: \tresult := api.serveTSDBBlocks(req)\n4153: \n4154: \tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(result.data)\n4155: \n4156: \tresp := w.Result()\n4157: \tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n4158: \n4159: \trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)\n4160: \n4161: \tvar resultData struct {\n4162: \t\tBlocks []tsdb.BlockMeta `json:\"blocks\"`\n4163: \t}\n4164: \terr := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&resultData)\n4165: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4166: \trequire.Len(t, resultData.Blocks, 1)\n4167: \trequire.Equal(t, blockMeta, resultData.Blocks[0])\n4168: }\n4169: \n4170: func TestRespondError(t *testing.T) {\n4171: \ts := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\n4172: \t\tapi := API{}\n4173: \t\tapi.respondError(w, &apiError{errorTimeout, errors.New(\"message\")}, \"test\")\n4174: \t}))\n4175: \tdefer s.Close()\n4176: \n4177: \tresp, err := http.Get(s.URL)\n4178: \trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Error on test request\")\n4179: \tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n4180: \tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n4181: \trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Error reading response body\")\n4182: \twant, have := http.StatusServiceUnavailable, resp.StatusCode\n4183: \trequire.Equal(t, want, have, \"Return code %d expected in error response but got %d\", want, have)\n4184: \th := resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\")\n4185: \trequire.Equal(t, \"application/json\", h, \"Expected Content-Type %q but got %q\", \"application/json\", h)\n4186: \trequire.JSONEq(t, `{\"status\": \"error\", \"data\": \"test\", \"errorType\": \"timeout\", \"error\": \"message\"}`, string(body))\n4187: }\n4188: \n4189: func TestParseTimeParam(t *testing.T) {\n4190: \ttype resultType struct {\n4191: \t\tasTime  time.Time\n4192: \t\tasError func() error\n4193: \t}\n4194: \n4195: \tts, err := parseTime(\"1582468023986\")\n4196: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4197: \n4198: \ttests := []struct {\n4199: \t\tparamName    string\n4200: \t\tparamValue   string\n4201: \t\tdefaultValue time.Time\n4202: \t\tresult       resultType\n4203: \t}{\n4204: \t\t{ // When data is valid.\n4205: \t\t\tparamName:    \"start\",\n4206: \t\t\tparamValue:   \"1582468023986\",\n4207: \t\t\tdefaultValue: MinTime,\n4208: \t\t\tresult: resultType{\n4209: \t\t\t\tasTime:  ts,\n4210: \t\t\t\tasError: nil,\n4211: \t\t\t},\n4212: \t\t},\n4213: \t\t{ // When data is empty string.\n4214: \t\t\tparamName:    \"end\",\n4215: \t\t\tparamValue:   \"\",\n4216: \t\t\tdefaultValue: MaxTime,\n4217: \t\t\tresult: resultType{\n4218: \t\t\t\tasTime:  MaxTime,\n4219: \t\t\t\tasError: nil,\n4220: \t\t\t},\n4221: \t\t},\n4222: \t\t{ // When data is not valid.\n4223: \t\t\tparamName:    \"foo\",\n4224: \t\t\tparamValue:   \"baz\",\n4225: \t\t\tdefaultValue: MaxTime,\n4226: \t\t\tresult: resultType{\n4227: \t\t\t\tasTime: time.Time{},\n4228: \t\t\t\tasError: func() error {\n4229: \t\t\t\t\t_, err := parseTime(\"baz\")\n4230: \t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid time value for '%s': %w\", \"foo\", err)\n4231: \t\t\t\t},\n4232: \t\t\t},\n4233: \t\t},\n4234: \t}\n4235: \n4236: \tfor _, test := range tests {\n4237: \t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, \"localhost:42/foo?\"+test.paramName+\"=\"+test.paramValue, nil)\n4238: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4239: \n4240: \t\tresult := test.result\n4241: \t\tasTime, err := parseTimeParam(req, test.paramName, test.defaultValue)\n4242: \n4243: \t\tif err != nil {\n4244: \t\t\trequire.EqualError(t, err, result.asError().Error())\n4245: \t\t} else {\n4246: \t\t\trequire.True(t, asTime.Equal(result.asTime), \"time as return value: %s not parsed correctly. Expected %s. Actual %s\", test.paramValue, result.asTime, asTime)\n4247: \t\t}\n4248: \t}\n4249: }\n4250: \n4251: func TestParseTime(t *testing.T) {\n4252: \tts, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, \"2015-06-03T13:21:58.555Z\")\n4253: \tif err != nil {\n4254: \t\tpanic(err)\n4255: \t}\n4256: \n4257: \ttests := []struct {\n4258: \t\tinput  string\n4259: \t\tfail   bool\n4260: \t\tresult time.Time\n4261: \t}{\n4262: \t\t{\n4263: \t\t\tinput: \"\",\n4264: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4265: \t\t},\n4266: \t\t{\n4267: \t\t\tinput: \"abc\",\n4268: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4269: \t\t},\n4270: \t\t{\n4271: \t\t\tinput: \"30s\",\n4272: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4273: \t\t},\n4274: \t\t{\n4275: \t\t\tinput:  \"123\",\n4276: \t\t\tresult: time.Unix(123, 0),\n4277: \t\t},\n4278: \t\t{\n4279: \t\t\tinput:  \"123.123\",\n4280: \t\t\tresult: time.Unix(123, 123000000),\n4281: \t\t},\n4282: \t\t{\n4283: \t\t\tinput:  \"2015-06-03T13:21:58.555Z\",\n4284: \t\t\tresult: ts,\n4285: \t\t},\n4286: \t\t{\n4287: \t\t\tinput:  \"2015-06-03T14:21:58.555+01:00\",\n4288: \t\t\tresult: ts,\n4289: \t\t},\n4290: \t\t{\n4291: \t\t\t// Test float rounding.\n4292: \t\t\tinput:  \"1543578564.705\",\n4293: \t\t\tresult: time.Unix(1543578564, 705*1e6),\n4294: \t\t},\n4295: \t\t{\n4296: \t\t\tinput:  MinTime.Format(time.RFC3339Nano),\n4297: \t\t\tresult: MinTime,\n4298: \t\t},\n4299: \t\t{\n4300: \t\t\tinput:  MaxTime.Format(time.RFC3339Nano),\n4301: \t\t\tresult: MaxTime,\n4302: \t\t},\n4303: \t}\n4304: \n4305: \tfor _, test := range tests {\n4306: \t\tts, err := parseTime(test.input)\n4307: \t\tif !test.fail {\n4308: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Unexpected error for %q\", test.input)\n4309: \t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, ts)\n4310: \t\t\trequire.True(t, ts.Equal(test.result), \"Expected time %v for input %q but got %v\", test.result, test.input, ts)\n4311: \t\t\tcontinue\n4312: \t\t}\n4313: \t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"Expected error for %q but got none\", test.input)\n4314: \t}\n4315: }\n4316: \n4317: func TestParseDuration(t *testing.T) {\n4318: \ttests := []struct {\n4319: \t\tinput  string\n4320: \t\tfail   bool\n4321: \t\tresult time.Duration\n4322: \t}{\n4323: \t\t{\n4324: \t\t\tinput: \"\",\n4325: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4326: \t\t}, {\n4327: \t\t\tinput: \"abc\",\n4328: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4329: \t\t}, {\n4330: \t\t\tinput: \"2015-06-03T13:21:58.555Z\",\n4331: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4332: \t\t}, {\n4333: \t\t\t// Internal int64 overflow.\n4334: \t\t\tinput: \"-148966367200.372\",\n4335: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4336: \t\t}, {\n4337: \t\t\t// Internal int64 overflow.\n4338: \t\t\tinput: \"148966367200.372\",\n4339: \t\t\tfail:  true,\n4340: \t\t}, {\n4341: \t\t\tinput:  \"123\",\n4342: \t\t\tresult: 123 * time.Second,\n4343: \t\t}, {\n4344: \t\t\tinput:  \"123.333\",\n4345: \t\t\tresult: 123*time.Second + 333*time.Millisecond,\n4346: \t\t}, {\n4347: \t\t\tinput:  \"15s\",\n4348: \t\t\tresult: 15 * time.Second,\n4349: \t\t}, {\n4350: \t\t\tinput:  \"5m\",\n4351: \t\t\tresult: 5 * time.Minute,\n4352: \t\t},\n4353: \t}\n4354: \n4355: \tfor _, test := range tests {\n4356: \t\td, err := parseDuration(test.input)\n4357: \t\tif !test.fail {\n4358: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Unexpected error for %q\", test.input)\n4359: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, test.result, d, \"Expected duration %v for input %q but got %v\", test.result, test.input, d)\n4360: \t\t\tcontinue\n4361: \t\t}\n4362: \t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"Expected error for %q but got none\", test.input)\n4363: \t}\n4364: }\n4365: \n4366: func TestOptionsMethod(t *testing.T) {\n4367: \tr := route.New()\n4368: \tapi := &API{ready: func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f }}\n4369: \tapi.Register(r)\n4370: \n4371: \ts := httptest.NewServer(r)\n4372: \tdefer s.Close()\n4373: \n4374: \treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodOptions, s.URL+\"/any_path\", nil)\n4375: \trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Error creating OPTIONS request\")\n4376: \tclient := &http.Client{}\n4377: \tresp, err := client.Do(req)\n4378: \trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Error executing OPTIONS request\")\n4379: \trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusNoContent, resp.StatusCode)\n4380: }\n4381: \n4382: func TestTSDBStatus(t *testing.T) {\n4383: \ttsdb := &fakeDB{}\n4384: \ttsdbStatusAPI := func(api *API) apiFunc { return api.serveTSDBStatus }\n4385: \n4386: \tfor i, tc := range []struct {\n4387: \t\tdb       *fakeDB\n4388: \t\tendpoint func(api *API) apiFunc\n4389: \t\tmethod   string\n4390: \t\tvalues   url.Values\n4391: \n4392: \t\terrType errorType\n4393: \t}{\n4394: \t\t// Tests for the TSDB Status endpoint.\n4395: \t\t{\n4396: \t\t\tdb:       tsdb,\n4397: \t\t\tendpoint: tsdbStatusAPI,\n4398: \t\t\terrType:  errorNone,\n4399: \t\t},\n4400: \t\t{\n4401: \t\t\tdb:       tsdb,\n4402: \t\t\tendpoint: tsdbStatusAPI,\n4403: \t\t\tvalues:   map[string][]string{\"limit\": {\"20\"}},\n4404: \t\t\terrType:  errorNone,\n4405: \t\t},\n4406: \t\t{\n4407: \t\t\tdb:       tsdb,\n4408: \t\t\tendpoint: tsdbStatusAPI,\n4409: \t\t\tvalues:   map[string][]string{\"limit\": {\"0\"}},\n4410: \t\t\terrType:  errorBadData,\n4411: \t\t},\n4412: \t} {\n4413: \t\tt.Run(strconv.Itoa(i), func(t *testing.T) {\n4414: \t\t\tapi := &API{db: tc.db, gatherer: prometheus.DefaultGatherer}\n4415: \t\t\tendpoint := tc.endpoint(api)\n4416: \t\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(tc.method, fmt.Sprintf(\"?%s\", tc.values.Encode()), nil)\n4417: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"Error when creating test request\")\n4418: \t\t\tres := endpoint(req)\n4419: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, tc.errType)\n4420: \t\t})\n4421: \t}\n4422: }\n4423: \n4424: func TestReturnAPIError(t *testing.T) {\n4425: \tcases := []struct {\n4426: \t\terr      error\n4427: \t\texpected errorType\n4428: \t}{\n4429: \t\t{\n4430: \t\t\terr:      promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"storage error\")},\n4431: \t\t\texpected: errorInternal,\n4432: \t\t}, {\n4433: \t\t\terr:      fmt.Errorf(\"wrapped: %w\", promql.ErrStorage{Err: errors.New(\"storage error\")}),\n4434: \t\t\texpected: errorInternal,\n4435: \t\t}, {\n4436: \t\t\terr:      promql.ErrQueryTimeout(\"timeout error\"),\n4437: \t\t\texpected: errorTimeout,\n4438: \t\t}, {\n4439: \t\t\terr:      fmt.Errorf(\"wrapped: %w\", promql.ErrQueryTimeout(\"timeout error\")),\n4440: \t\t\texpected: errorTimeout,\n4441: \t\t}, {\n4442: \t\t\terr:      promql.ErrQueryCanceled(\"canceled error\"),\n4443: \t\t\texpected: errorCanceled,\n4444: \t\t}, {\n4445: \t\t\terr:      fmt.Errorf(\"wrapped: %w\", promql.ErrQueryCanceled(\"canceled error\")),\n4446: \t\t\texpected: errorCanceled,\n4447: \t\t}, {\n4448: \t\t\terr:      errors.New(\"exec error\"),\n4449: \t\t\texpected: errorExec,\n4450: \t\t}, {\n4451: \t\t\terr:      context.Canceled,\n4452: \t\t\texpected: errorCanceled,\n4453: \t\t},\n4454: \t}\n4455: \n4456: \tfor ix, c := range cases {\n4457: \t\tactual := returnAPIError(c.err)\n4458: \t\trequire.Error(t, actual, ix)\n4459: \t\trequire.Equal(t, c.expected, actual.typ, ix)\n4460: \t}\n4461: }\n4462: \n4463: // This is a global to avoid the benchmark being optimized away.\n4464: var testResponseWriter = httptest.ResponseRecorder{}\n4465: \n4466: func BenchmarkRespond(b *testing.B) {\n4467: \tpoints := []promql.FPoint{}\n4468: \tfor i := range 10000 {\n4469: \t\tpoints = append(points, promql.FPoint{F: float64(i * 1000000), T: int64(i)})\n4470: \t}\n4471: \tmatrix := promql.Matrix{}\n4472: \tfor i := range 1000 {\n4473: \t\tmatrix = append(matrix, promql.Series{\n4474: \t\t\tMetric: labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", fmt.Sprintf(\"series%v\", i),\n4475: \t\t\t\t\"label\", fmt.Sprintf(\"series%v\", i),\n4476: \t\t\t\t\"label2\", fmt.Sprintf(\"series%v\", i)),\n4477: \t\t\tFloats: points[:10],\n4478: \t\t})\n4479: \t}\n4480: \tseries := []labels.Labels{}\n4481: \tfor i := range 1000 {\n4482: \t\tseries = append(series, labels.FromStrings(\"__name__\", fmt.Sprintf(\"series%v\", i),\n4483: \t\t\t\"label\", fmt.Sprintf(\"series%v\", i),\n4484: \t\t\t\"label2\", fmt.Sprintf(\"series%v\", i)))\n4485: \t}\n4486: \n4487: \tcases := []struct {\n4488: \t\tname     string\n4489: \t\tresponse any\n4490: \t}{\n4491: \t\t{name: \"10000 points no labels\", response: &QueryData{\n4492: \t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeMatrix,\n4493: \t\t\tResult: promql.Matrix{\n4494: \t\t\t\tpromql.Series{\n4495: \t\t\t\t\tFloats: points,\n4496: \t\t\t\t\tMetric: labels.EmptyLabels(),\n4497: \t\t\t\t},\n4498: \t\t\t},\n4499: \t\t}},\n4500: \t\t{name: \"1000 labels\", response: series},\n4501: \t\t{name: \"1000 series 10 points\", response: &QueryData{\n4502: \t\t\tResultType: parser.ValueTypeMatrix,\n4503: \t\t\tResult:     matrix,\n4504: \t\t}},\n4505: \t}\n4506: \tfor _, c := range cases {\n4507: \t\tb.Run(c.name, func(b *testing.B) {\n4508: \t\t\tb.ReportAllocs()\n4509: \t\t\trequest, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, \"/does-not-matter\", nil)\n4510: \t\t\trequire.NoError(b, err)\n4511: \t\t\tb.ResetTimer()\n4512: \t\t\tapi := API{}\n4513: \t\t\tapi.InstallCodec(JSONCodec{})\n4514: \t\t\tfor n := 0; n < b.N; n++ {\n4515: \t\t\t\tapi.respond(&testResponseWriter, request, c.response, nil, \"\")\n4516: \t\t\t}\n4517: \t\t})\n4518: \t}\n4519: }\n4520: \n4521: func TestGetGlobalURL(t *testing.T) {\n4522: \tmustParseURL := func(t *testing.T, u string) *url.URL {\n4523: \t\tparsed, err := url.Parse(u)\n4524: \t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4525: \t\treturn parsed\n4526: \t}\n4527: \n4528: \ttestcases := []struct {\n4529: \t\tinput    *url.URL\n4530: \t\topts     GlobalURLOptions\n4531: \t\texpected *url.URL\n4532: \t\terrorful bool\n4533: \t}{\n4534: \t\t{\n4535: \t\t\tmustParseURL(t, \"http://127.0.0.1:9090\"),\n4536: \t\t\tGlobalURLOptions{\n4537: \t\t\t\tListenAddress: \"127.0.0.1:9090\",\n4538: \t\t\t\tHost:          \"127.0.0.1:9090\",\n4539: \t\t\t\tScheme:        \"http\",\n4540: \t\t\t},\n4541: \t\t\tmustParseURL(t, \"http://127.0.0.1:9090\"),\n4542: \t\t\tfalse,\n4543: \t\t},\n4544: \t\t{\n4545: \t\t\tmustParseURL(t, \"http://127.0.0.1:9090\"),\n4546: \t\t\tGlobalURLOptions{\n4547: \t\t\t\tListenAddress: \"127.0.0.1:9090\",\n4548: \t\t\t\tHost:          \"prometheus.io\",\n4549: \t\t\t\tScheme:        \"https\",\n4550: \t\t\t},\n4551: \t\t\tmustParseURL(t, \"https://prometheus.io\"),\n4552: \t\t\tfalse,\n4553: \t\t},\n4554: \t\t{\n4555: \t\t\tmustParseURL(t, \"http://example.com\"),\n4556: \t\t\tmustParseURL(t, \"http://[::1]:9091\"),\n4612: \t\t\tfalse,\n4613: \t\t},\n4614: \t}\n4615: \n4616: \tfor i, tc := range testcases {\n4617: \t\tt.Run(fmt.Sprintf(\"Test %d\", i), func(t *testing.T) {\n4618: \t\t\toutput, err := getGlobalURL(tc.input, tc.opts)\n4619: \t\t\tif tc.errorful {\n4620: \t\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err)\n4621: \t\t\t\treturn\n4622: \t\t\t}\n4623: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4624: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, tc.expected, output)\n4625: \t\t})\n4626: \t}\n4627: }\n4628: \n4629: type testCodec struct {\n4630: \tcontentType MIMEType\n4631: \tcanEncode   bool\n4632: }\n4633: \n4634: func (t *testCodec) ContentType() MIMEType {\n4635: \treturn t.contentType\n4636: }\n4637: \n4638: func (t *testCodec) CanEncode(*Response) bool {\n4639: \treturn t.canEncode\n4640: }\n4641: \n4642: func (t *testCodec) Encode(*Response) ([]byte, error) {\n4643: \treturn fmt.Appendf(nil, \"response from %v codec\", t.contentType), nil\n4644: }\n4645: \n4646: func TestExtractQueryOpts(t *testing.T) {\n4647: \ttests := []struct {\n4648: \t\tname   string\n4649: \t\tform   url.Values\n4650: \t\texpect promql.QueryOpts\n4651: \t\terr    error\n4652: \t}{\n4653: \t\t{\n4654: \t\t\tname: \"with stats all\",\n4655: \t\t\tform: url.Values{\n4656: \t\t\t\t\"stats\": []string{\"all\"},\n4657: \t\t\t},\n4658: \t\t\texpect: promql.NewPrometheusQueryOpts(true, 0),\n4659: \n4660: \t\t\terr: nil,\n4661: \t\t},\n4662: \t\t{\n4663: \t\t\tname: \"with stats none\",\n4664: \t\t\tform: url.Values{\n4665: \t\t\t\t\"stats\": []string{\"none\"},\n4666: \t\t\t},\n4667: \t\t\texpect: promql.NewPrometheusQueryOpts(false, 0),\n4668: \t\t\terr:    nil,\n4669: \t\t},\n4670: \t\t{\n4671: \t\t\tname: \"with lookback delta\",\n4672: \t\t\tform: url.Values{\n4673: \t\t\t\t\"stats\":          []string{\"all\"},\n4674: \t\t\t\t\"lookback_delta\": []string{\"30s\"},\n4675: \t\t\t},\n4676: \t\t\texpect: promql.NewPrometheusQueryOpts(true, 30*time.Second),\n4677: \t\t\terr:    nil,\n4678: \t\t},\n4679: \t\t{\n4680: \t\t\tname: \"with invalid lookback delta\",\n4681: \t\t\tform: url.Values{\n4682: \t\t\t\t\"lookback_delta\": []string{\"invalid\"},\n4683: \t\t\t},\n4684: \t\t\texpect: nil,\n4685: \t\t\terr:    errors.New(`error parsing lookback delta duration: cannot parse \"invalid\" to a valid duration`),\n4686: \t\t},\n4687: \t}\n4688: \n4689: \tfor _, test := range tests {\n4690: \t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n4691: \t\t\treq := &http.Request{Form: test.form}\n4692: \t\t\topts, err := extractQueryOpts(req)\n4693: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, test.expect, opts)\n4694: \t\t\tif test.err == nil {\n4695: \t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4696: \t\t\t} else {\n4697: \t\t\t\trequire.EqualError(t, err, test.err.Error())\n4698: \t\t\t}\n4699: \t\t})\n4700: \t}\n4701: }\n4702: \n4703: // Test query timeout parameter.\n4704: func TestQueryTimeout(t *testing.T) {\n4705: \tstorage := promqltest.LoadedStorage(t, `\n4706: \t\tload 1m\n4707: \t\t\ttest_metric1{foo=\"bar\"} 0+100x100\n4708: \t`)\n4709: \tt.Cleanup(func() {\n4710: \t\t_ = storage.Close()\n4711: \t})\n4712: \n4713: \tnow := time.Now()\n4714: \n4715: \tfor _, tc := range []struct {\n4716: \t\tname   string\n4717: \t\tmethod string\n4718: \t}{\n4719: \t\t{\n4720: \t\t\tname:   \"GET method\",\n4721: \t\t\tmethod: http.MethodGet,\n4722: \t\t},\n4723: \t\t{\n4724: \t\t\tname:   \"POST method\",\n4725: \t\t\tmethod: http.MethodPost,\n4726: \t\t},\n4727: \t} {\n4728: \t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n4729: \t\t\tengine := &fakeEngine{}\n4730: \t\t\tapi := &API{\n4731: \t\t\t\tQueryable:             storage,\n4732: \t\t\t\tQueryEngine:           engine,\n4733: \t\t\t\tExemplarQueryable:     storage.ExemplarQueryable(),\n4734: \t\t\t\talertmanagerRetriever: testAlertmanagerRetriever{}.toFactory(),\n4735: \t\t\t\tflagsMap:              sampleFlagMap,\n4736: \t\t\t\tnow:                   func() time.Time { return now },\n4737: \t\t\t\tconfig:                func() config.Config { return samplePrometheusCfg },\n4738: \t\t\t\tready:                 func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n4739: \t\t\t}\n4740: \n4741: \t\t\tquery := url.Values{\n4742: \t\t\t\t\"query\":   []string{\"2\"},\n4743: \t\t\t\t\"timeout\": []string{\"1s\"},\n4744: \t\t\t}\n4745: \t\t\tctx := context.Background()\n4746: \t\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(tc.method, fmt.Sprintf(\"http://example.com?%s\", query.Encode()), nil)\n4747: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n4748: \t\t\treq.RemoteAddr = \"127.0.0.1:20201\"\n4749: \n4750: \t\t\tres := api.query(req.WithContext(ctx))\n4751: \t\t\tassertAPIError(t, res.err, errorNone)\n4752: \n4753: \t\t\trequire.Len(t, engine.query.execCalls, 1)\n4754: \t\t\tdeadline, ok := engine.query.execCalls[0].Deadline()\n4755: \t\t\trequire.True(t, ok)\n4756: \t\t\trequire.Equal(t, now.Add(time.Second), deadline)\n4757: \t\t})\n4758: \t}\n4759: }\n4760: \n4761: // fakeEngine is a fake QueryEngine implementation.\n4762: type fakeEngine struct {\n4763: \tquery fakeQuery\n4764: }\n4765: \n4766: func (e *fakeEngine) NewInstantQuery(context.Context, storage.Queryable, promql.QueryOpts, string, time.Time) (promql.Query, error) {\n4767: \treturn &e.query, nil\n4768: }\n4769: *fakeQuery) Exec(ctx context.Context) *promql.Result {\n4781: \tq.execCalls = append(q.execCalls, ctx)\n4782: \treturn &promql.Result{\n4783: \t\tValue: &parser.StringLiteral{\n4784: \t\t\tVal: \",\"endLine\":37,\"startLine\":33},{\"content\":\"53:  - [BUGFIX] Keep series that are still in WAL in checkpoints.\\n54:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Fast path for EmptyPostings cases in Merge, Intersect and \",\"endLine\":58,\"startLine\":53},{\"content\":\"22:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Improved atomicity of .tmp block replacement during compaction for usual case.\\n23:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Improved postings         "chunks": [
          {
            "content": "222: type SeriesLifecycleCallback interface {\n223: \t// PreCreation is called before creating a series to indicate if the series can be created.\n224: \t// A non nil error means the series should not be created.\n225: \tPreCreation(labels.Labels) error\n226: \t// PostCreation is called after creating a series to indicate a creation of series.\n227: \tPostCreation(labels.Labels)\n228: \t// PostDeletion is called after deletion of series.\n229: \tPostDeletion(map[chunks.HeadSeriesRef]labels.Labels)\n230: }\n231: ",
            "endLine": 231,
            "startLine": 222
          },
          {
            "content": "2113: \n2114: func (s *stripeSeries) postCreation(lset labels.Labels) {\n2115: \ts.seriesLifecycleCallback.PostCreation(lset)\n2116: }\n2117: ",
            "endLine": 2117,
            "startLine": 2113
          },
          {
            "content": "2411: \n2412: func (noopSeriesLifecycleCallback) PreCreation(labels.Labels) error                     { return nil }\n2413: func (noopSeriesLifecycleCallback) PostCreation(labels.Labels)                          {}\n2414: func (noopSeriesLifecycleCallback) PostDeletion(map[chunks.HeadSeriesRef]labels.Labels) {}\n2415: \n2416: ",
            "endLine": 2416,

            "content": "539: \tfmt.Printf(\"\\nLabel names most involved in churning:\\n\")\n540: \tprintInfo(postingInfos)\n541: \n542: \tpostingInfos = postingInfos[:0]\n543: \tfor k, m := range labelpairsCount {\n544: \t\tpostingInfos = append(postingInfos, postingInfo{k, m})\n545: \t}\n546: ",

          {
            "content": "610: func analyzeCompaction(ctx context.Context, block tsdb.BlockReader, indexr tsdb.IndexReader, matchers []*labels.Matcher) (err error) {\n611: \tvar postingsr index.Postings\n612: \tif len(matchers) > 0 {\n613: \t\tpostingsr, err = tsdb.PostingsForMatchers(ctx, indexr, matchers...)\n614: \t} else {\n615: \t\tn, v := index.AllPostingsKey()\n616: \t\tpostingsr, err = indexr.Postings(ctx, n, v)\n617: \t}\n618: ",

            "content": "522: \t}\n523: \tfmt.Printf(\"Postings (unique label pairs): %d\\n\", len(labelpairsUncovered))\n524: \tfmt.Printf(\"Postings entries (total label pairs): %d\\n\", entries)\n525: \n526: \tpostingInfos = postingInfos[:0]\n527: \tfor k, m := range labelpairsUncovered {\n528: \t\tpostingInfos = append(postingInfos, postingInfo{k, uint64(float64(m) / float64(meta.MaxTime-meta.MinTime))})\n529: \t}\n530: ",

            "content": "192: \n193: // PostingsForMatchers assembles a single postings iterator against the index reader\n194: // based on the given matchers.             "endLine": 200,

            "endLine": 366,

          }

          {
            "content": "745: \n746: // IndexReaderPostingsFunc is a function to get a sorted posting iterator from a given index reader.\n747: type IndexReaderPostingsFunc func(ctx context.Context, reader IndexReader) index.Postings\n748: \n749: // AllSortedPostings returns a sorted all posting iterator from the input index reader.\n750: func AllSortedPostings(ctx context.Context, reader IndexReader) index.Postings {\n751: \tk, v := index.AllPostingsKey()\n752: \tall, err := reader.Postings(ctx, k, v)\n753: \tif err != nil {\n754: \t\treturn index.ErrPostings(err)\n755: \t}\n756: \treturn reader.SortedPostings(all)\n757: }\n758: ",
            "endLine": 758,
            "startLine": 745
          }
        ],

        "chunks": [
          {
            "content": "33:  - [BUGFIX] Don't crash on an unknown tombstone ref.\n34:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Re-add `FromData` function to create a chunk from bytes. It is used by Cortex and Thanos.\n35:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Simplify mergedPostings.Seek.\n36:  - [FEATURE]  Added `currentSegment` metric for the current WAL segment it is being written to.\n37: ",
            "endLine": 37,
            "startLine": 33
          },
          {
            "content": "53:  - [BUGFIX] Keep series that are still in WAL in checkpoints.\n54:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Fast path for EmptyPostings cases in Merge, Intersect and Without.\n55:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Be smarter in how we look at matchers.\n56:  - [ENHANCEMENT] PostListings and NotMatcher now public.\n57: \n58: ",
            "endLine": 58,
            "startLine": 53
          },
          {
            "content": "22:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Improved atomicity of .tmp block replacement during compaction for usual case.\n23:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Improved postings intersection matching.\n24:  - [ENHANCEMENT] Reduced disk usage for WAL for small setups.\n25: ",
            "endLine": 25,
            "startLine": 22
          }
        ],
        "file": "tsdb/CHANGELOG.md",
        "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4",
        "type": "file",
        "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4/-/blob/tsdb/CHANGELOG.md"

as statistics.\\n204: type TSDBAdminStats interface {\\n205: \\tCleanTombstones() error\\n206: \\tDelete(ctx context.Context, mint, maxt int64, ms ...*labels.Matcher) error\\n207: \\tSnapshot(dir string, withHead bool) error\\n208: \\tStats(statsByLabelName string, limit int) (*tsdb.Stats, error)\\n209: \\tWALReplayStatus() (tsdb.WALReplayStatus, error)\\n210: \\tBlockMetas() ([]tsdb.BlockMeta, error)\\n211: }\\n212: \\n213: type QueryOpts interface {\\n214: \\tEnablePerStepStats() bool\\n215: \\tLookbackDelta() time.Duration\\n216: }\\n217: \\n218: // API can register a set of endpoints in a router and handle\\n219: // them using the provided storage and query engine.\\n220: type API struct {\\n221: \\tQueryable         storage.SampleAndChunkQueryable\\n222: \\tQueryEngine       promql.QueryEngine\\n223: \\tExemplarQueryable storage.ExemplarQueryable\\n224: \\n225: \\tscrapePoolsRetriever  func(context.Context) ScrapePoolsRetriever\\n226: \\ttargetRetriever       func(context.Context) TargetRetriever\\n227: \\talertmanagerRetriever func(context.Context) AlertmanagerRetriever\\n228: \\trulesRetriever        func(context.Context) RulesRetriever\\n229: \\tnow                   func() time.Time\\n230: \\tconfig                func() config.Config\\n231: \\tflagsMap              map[string]string\\n232: \\tready                 func(http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc\\n233: \\tglobalURLOptions      GlobalURLOptions\\n234: \\n235: \\tdb                  TSDBAdminStats\\n236: \\tdbDir               string\\n237: \\tenableAdmin         bool\\n238: \\tlogger              *slog.Logger\\n239: \\tCORSOrigin          *regexp.Regexp\\n240: \\tbuildInfo           *PrometheusVersion\\n241: \\truntimeInfo         func() (RuntimeInfo, error)\\n242: \\tgatherer            prometheus.Gatherer\\n243: \\tisAgent             bool\\n244: \\tstatsRenderer       StatsRenderer\\n245: \\tnotificationsGetter func() []notifications.Notification\\n246: \\tnotificationsSub    func() (<-chan notifications.Notification, func(), bool)\\n247: \\t// Allows customizing the default mapping\\n248: \\toverrideErrorCode OverrideErrorCode\\n249: \\n250: \\tremoteWriteHandler http.Handler\\n251: \\tremoteReadHandler  http.Handler\\n252: \\totlpWriteHandler   http.Handler\\n253: \\n254: \\tcodecs []Codec\\n255: }\\n256: \\n257: // NewAPI returns an initialized API type.\\n258: func NewAPI(\\n259: \\tqe promql.QueryEngine,\\n260: \\tq storage.SampleAndChunkQueryable,\\n261: \\tap storage.Appendable,\\n262: \\teq storage.ExemplarQueryable,\\n263: \\tspsr func(context.Context) ScrapePoolsRetriever,\\n264: \\ttr func(context.Context) TargetRetriever,\\n265: \\tar func(context.Context) AlertmanagerRetriever,\\n266: \\tconfigFunc func() config.Config,\\n267: \\tflagsMap map[string]string,\\n268: \\tglobalURLOptions GlobalURLOptions,\\n269: \\treadyFunc func(http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc,\\n270: \\tdb TSDBAdminStats,\\n271: \\tdbDir string,\\n272: \\tenableAdmin bool,\\n273: \\tlogger *slog.Logger,\\n274: \\trr func(context.Context) RulesRetriever,\\n275: \\tremoteReadSampleLimit int,\\n276: \\tremoteReadConcurrencyLimit int,\\n277: \\tremoteReadMaxBytesInFrame int,\\n278: \\tisAgent bool,\\n279: \\tcorsOrigin *regexp.Regexp,\\n280: \\truntimeInfo func() (RuntimeInfo, error),\\n281: \\tbuildInfo *PrometheusVersion,\\n282: \\tnotificationsGetter func() []notifications.Notification,\\n283: \\tnotificationsSub func() (<-chan notifications.Notification, func(), bool),\\n284: \\tgatherer prometheus.Gatherer,\\n285: \\tregisterer prometheus.Registerer,\\n286: \\tstatsRenderer StatsRenderer,\\n287: \\trwEnabled bool,\\n288: \\tacceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs []config.RemoteWriteProtoMsg,\\n289: \\totlpEnabled, otlpDeltaToCumulative, otlpNativeDeltaIngestion bool,\\n290: \\tctZeroIngestionEnabled bool,\\n291: \\tlookbackDelta time.Duration,\\n292: \\tenableTypeAndUnitLabels bool,\\n293: \\toverrideErrorCode OverrideErrorCode,\\n294: ) *API {\\n295: \\ta := &API{\\n296: \\t\\tQueryEngine:       qe,\\n297: \\t\\tQueryable:         q,\\n298: \\t\\tExemplarQueryable: eq,\\n299: \\n300: \\t\\tscrapePoolsRetriever:  spsr,\\n301: \\t\\ttargetRetriever:       tr,\\n302: \\t\\talertmanagerRetriever: ar,\\n303: \\n304: \\t\\tnow:                 time.Now,\\n305: \\t\\tconfig:              configFunc,\\n306: \\t\\tflagsMap:            flagsMap,\\n307: \\t\\tready:               readyFunc,\\n308: \\t\\tglobalURLOptions:    globalURLOptions,\\n309: \\t\\tdb:                  db,\\n310: \\t\\tdbDir:               dbDir,\\n311: \\t\\tenableAdmin:         enableAdmin,\\n312: \\t\\trulesRetriever:      rr,\\n313: \\t\\tlogger:              logger,\\n314: \\t\\tCORSOrigin:          corsOrigin,\\n315: \\t\\truntimeInfo:         runtimeInfo,\\n316: \\t\\tbuildInfo:           buildInfo,\\n317: \\t\\tgatherer:            gatherer,\\n318: \\t\\tisAgent:             isAgent,\\n319: \\t\\tstatsRenderer:       DefaultStatsRenderer,\\n320: \\t\\tnotificationsGetter: notificationsGetter,\\n321: \\t\\tnotificationsSub:    notificationsSub,\\n322: \\t\\toverrideErrorCode:   overrideErrorCode,\\n323: \\n324: \\t\\tremoteReadHandler: remote.NewReadHandler(logger, registerer, q, configFunc, remoteReadSampleLimit, remoteReadConcurrencyLimit, remoteReadMaxBytesInFrame),\\n325: \\t}\\n326: \\n327: \\ta.InstallCodec(JSONCodec{})\\n328: \\n329: \\tif statsRenderer != nil {\\n330: \\t\\ta.statsRenderer = statsRenderer\\n331: \\t}\\n332: \\n333: \\tif ap == nil && (rwEnabled || otlpEnabled) {\\n334: \\t\\tpanic(\\\"remote write or otlp write enabled, but no appender passed in.\\\")\\n335: \\t}\\n336: \\n337: \\tif rwEnabled {\\n338: \\t\\ta.remoteWriteHandler = remote.NewWriteHandler(logger, registerer, ap, acceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs, ctZeroIngestionEnabled)\\n339: \\t}\\n340: \\tif otlpEnabled {\\n341: \\t\\ta.otlpWriteHandler = remote.NewOTLPWriteHandler(logger, registerer, ap, configFunc, remote.OTLPOptions{\\n342: \\t\\t\\tConvertDelta:            otlpDeltaToCumulative,\\n343: \\t\\t\\tNativeDelta:             otlpNativeDeltaIngestion,\\n344: \\t\\t\\tLookbackDelta:           lookbackDelta,\\n345: \\t\\t\\tEnableTypeAndUnitLabels: enableTypeAndUnitLabels,\\n346: \\t\\t})\\n347: \\t}\\n348: \\n349: \\treturn a\\n350: }\\n351: \\n352: // InstallCodec adds codec to this API's available codecs.\\n353: // Codecs installed first take precedence over codecs installed later when evaluating wildcards in Accept headers.\\n354: // The first installed codec is used as a fallback when the Accept header cannot be satisfied or if there is no Accept header.\\n355: func (api *API) InstallCodec(codec Codec) {\\n356: \\tapi.codecs = append(api.codecs, codec)\\n357: }\\n358: \\n359: // ClearCodecs removes all available codecs from this API, including the default codec installed by NewAPI.\\n360: func (api *API) ClearCodecs() {\\n361: \\tapi.codecs = nil\\n362: }\\n363: \\n364: func setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(r apiFuncResult) apiFuncResult {\\n365: \\tif r.err != nil && errors.Is(r.err.err, tsdb.ErrNotReady) {\\n366: \\t\\tr.err.typ = errorUnavailable\\n367: \\t}\\n368: \\treturn r\\n369: }\\n370: \\n371: // Register the API's endpoints in the given router.\\n372: func (api *API) Register(r *route.Router) {\\n373: \\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n374: \\t\\thf := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n375: \\t\\t\\thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\\n376: \\t\\t\\tresult := setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(f(r))\\n377: \\t\\t\\tif result.finalizer != nil {\\n378: \\t\\t\\t\\tdefer result.finalizer()\\n379: \\t\\t\\t}\\n380: \\t\\t\\tif result.err != nil {\\n381: \\t\\t\\t\\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\\n382: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n383: \\t\\t\\t}\\n384: \\n385: \\t\\t\\tif result.data != nil {\\n386: \\t\\t\\t\\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\\\"query\\\"))\\n387: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n388: \\t\\t\\t}\\n389: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\\n390: \\t\\t})\\n391: \\t\\treturn api.ready(httputil.CompressionHandler{\\n392: \\t\\t\\tHandler: hf,\\n393: \\t\\t}.ServeHTTP)\\n394: \\t}\\n395: \\n396: \\twrapAgent := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n397: \\t\\treturn wrap(func(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n398: \\t\\t\\tif api.isAgent {\\n399: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorExec, errors.New(\\\"unavailable with Prometheus Agent\\\")}, nil, nil}\\n400: \\t\\t\\t}\\n401: \\t\\t\\treturn f(r)\\n402: \\t\\t})\\n403: \\t}\\n404: \\n405: \\tr.Options(\\\"/*path\\\", wrap(api.options))\\n406: \\n407: \\tr.Get(\\\"/query\\\", wrapAgent(api.query))\\n408: \\tr.Post(\\\"/query\\\", wrapAgent(api.query))\\n409: \\tr.Get(\\\"/query_range\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryRange))\\n410: \\tr.Post(\\\"/query_range\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryRange))\\n411: \\tr.Get(\\\"/query_exemplars\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryExemplars))\\n412: \\tr.Post(\\\"/query_exemplars\\\", wrapAgent(api.queryExemplars))\\n413: \\n414: \\tr.Get(\\\"/format_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.formatQuery))\\n415: \\tr.Post(\\\"/format_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.formatQuery))\\n416: \\n417: \\tr.Get(\\\"/parse_query\\\", wrapAgent(api.parseQuery))\\n418: \\tr.Post(\\\"/parse_query\\\", wrap(api.targetMetadata))\\n431: \\tr.Get(\\\"/alertmanagers\\\", wrapAgent(api.alertmanagers))\\n432: \\n433: \\tr.Get(\\\"/metadata\\\", wrap(api.metricMetadata))\\n434: \\n435: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/config\\\", wrap(api.serveConfig))\\n436: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/runtimeinfo\\\", wrap(api.serveRuntimeInfo))\\n437: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/buildinfo\\\", wrap(api.serveBuildInfo))\\n438: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/flags\\\", wrap(api.serveFlags))\\n439: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/tsdb\\\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBStatus))\\n440: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/tsdb/blocks\\\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBBlocks))\\n441: \\tr.Get(\\\"/status/walreplay\\\", api.serveWALReplayStatus)\\n442: \\tr.Get(\\\"/notifications\\\", api.notifications)\\n443: \\tr.Get(\\\"/notifications/live\\\", api.notificationsSSE)\\n444: \\tr.Post(\\\"/read\\\", api.ready(api.remoteRead))\\n445: \\tr.Post(\\\"/write\\\", api.ready(api.remoteWrite))\\n446: \\tr.Post(\\\"/otlp/v1/metrics\\\", api.ready(api.otlpWrite))\\n447: \\n448: \\tr.Get(\\\"/alerts\\\", wrapAgent(api.alerts))\\n449: \\tr.Get(\\\"/rules\\\", wrapAgent(api.rules))\\n450: \\n451: \\t// Admin APIs\\n452: \\tr.Post(\\\"/admin/tsdb/delete_series\\\", wrapAgent(api.deleteSeries))\\n453: \\tr.Post(\\\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\\\", wrapAgent(api.cleanTombstones))\\n454: \\tr.Post(\\\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\\\", wrapAgent(api.snapshot))\\n455: \\n456: \\tr.Put(\\\"/admin/tsdb/delete_series\\\", wrapAgent(api.deleteSeries))\\n457: \\tr.Put(\\\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\\\", wrapAgent(api.cleanTombstones))\\n458: \\tr.Put(\\\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\\\", wrapAgent(api.snapshot))\\n459: }\\n460: \\n461: type QueryData struct `json:\\\"stats,omitempty\\\"`\\n465: }\\n466: \\n467: func invalidParamError(err error, parameter string) apiFuncResult {\\n468: \\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{\\n469: \\t\\terrorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\\\"invalid parameter %q: %w\\\", parameter, err),\\n470: \\t}, nil, nil}\\n471: }\\n472: \\n473: func (*API) options(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\\n474: \\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, nil, nil, nil}\\n475: }\\n476: \\n477: func (api *API) query(r *http.Request) (result apiFuncResult) {\\n478: \\tlimit, err := parseLimitParam(r.FormValue(\\\"limit\\\"))\\n479: \\tif err != nil {\\n480: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"limit\\\")\\n481: \\t}\\n482: \\tts, err := parseTimeParam(r, \\\"time\\\", api.now())\\n483: \\tif err != nil {\\n484: \\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"time\\\")\\n485: \\t}\\n486: \\tctx := r.Context()\\n487: \\tif to := r.FormValue(\\\"timeout\\\"); to != \\\"\\\" {\\n488: \\t\\tvar cancel context.CancelFunc\\n489: \\t\\ttimeout, err := parseDuration(to)\\n490: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n491: \\t\\t\\treturn invalidParamError(err, \\\"timeout\\\")\\n492: \\t\\t}\\n493: \\n494: \\t\\tctx, cancel = context.WithDeadline(ctx, api.now().Add(timeout))\\n495: \\t\\tdefer cancel()\\n496: \\t}\\n497: \\n498: \\topts, err := extractQueryOpts(r)\\n499: \\tif err != nil {\\n500: \\t\\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, withHead bool) error\n208: \tStats(statsByLabelName string, limit int) (*tsdb.Stats, error)\n209: \tWALReplayStatus() (tsdb.WALReplayStatus, error)\n210: \tBlockMetas() ([]tsdb.BlockMeta, error)\n211: handle\n219: // them using the provided storage and query engine.\n220: type API struct {\n221: \tQueryable         storage.SampleAndChunkQueryable\n222: \tQueryEngine       promql.QueryEngine\n223: \talertmanagerRetriever func(context.Context) AlertmanagerRetriever\n228: \trulesRetriever        func(context.Context) RulesRetriever\n229: \tnow                   func() time.Time\n230: \tconfig \totlpWriteHandler   http.Handler\n253: \n254: \tcodecs []Codec\n255: }\n256: \n257: // NewAPI returns an initialized API type.\n258: func NewAPI(\n259: \tqe promql.QueryEngine,\n260: \tq {\n334: \t\tpanic(\"remote write or otlp write enabled, but no appender passed in.\")\n335: \t}\n336: \n337: \tif rwEnabled {\n338: \t\ta.remoteWriteHandler = remote.NewWriteHandler(logger, registerer, ap, acceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs, ctZeroIngestionEnabled)\n339: \t}\n340: \tif otlpEnabled {\n341: \t\ta.otlpWriteHandler = remote.NewOTLPWriteHandler(logger, registerer, ap, configFunc, remote.OTLPOptions{\n342: \t\t\tConvertDelta:            otlpDeltaToCumulative,\n343: \t\t\tNativeDelta:             otlpNativeDeltaIngestion,\n344: \t\t\tLookbackDelta:           lookbackDelta,\n345: installed first take precedence over codecs installed later when evaluating wildcards in Accept headers.\n354: // The first installed codec is used as a fallback when the Accept header cannot be satisfied or if there is no Accept header.\n355: func (api *API) InstallCodec(codec Codec) {\n356: \tapi.codecs = append(api.codecs, codec)\n357: }\n358: \n359: // ClearCodecs removes all available codecs from this API, including the default codec installed by NewAPI.\n360: func (api *API) ClearCodecs() {\n361: \tapi.codecs = nil\n362: }\n363: \n364: func setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(r apiFuncResult) apiFuncResult {\n365: \tif r.err != nil && errors.Is(r.err.err, tsdb.ErrNotReady) {\n366: \t\tr.err.typ = errorUnavailable\n367: \t}\n368: \treturn r\n369: }\n370: \n371: // Register the API's endpoints in the given router.\n372: func (api *API) Register(r *route.Router) {\n373: \twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n374: \t\thf := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n375: \t\t\thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\n376: \t\t\tresult := setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(f(r))\n377: \t\t\tif result.finalizer != nil {\n378: \t\t\t\tdefer result.finalizer()\n379: \t\t\t}\n380: \t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n381: \t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n382: \t\t\t\treturn\n383: \t\t\t}\n384: \n385: \t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n386: \t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n387: \t\t\t\treturn\n388: \t\t\t}\n389: \t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n390: \t\t})\n391: \t\treturn api.ready(httputil.CompressionHandler{\n392: \t\t\tHandler: hf,\n393: \t\t}.ServeHTTP)\n394: \t}\n395: \n396: \twrapAgent := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n397: \t\treturn wrap(func(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n398: \t\t\tif api.isAgent {\n399: \t\t\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorExec, errors.New(\"unavailable with Prometheus Agent\")}, nil, nil}\n400: \tr.Get(\"/targets\", wrap(api.targets))\n430: \tr.Get(\"/targets/metadata\", wrap(api.targetMetadata))\n431: \tr.Get(\"/alertmanagers\", wrapAgent(api.alertmanagers))\n432: \n433: \tr.Get(\"/metadata\", wrap(api.metricMetadata))\n434: \n435: \tr.Get(\"/status/config\", wrap(api.serveConfig))\n436: \tr.Get(\"/status/runtimeinfo\", wrap(api.serveRuntimeInfo))\n437: \tr.Get(\"/status/buildinfo\", wrap(api.serveBuildInfo))\n438: \tr.Get(\"/status/flags\", wrap(api.serveFlags))\n439: \tr.Get(\"/status/tsdb\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBStatus))\n440: \tr.Get(\"/status/tsdb/blocks\", wrapAgent(api.serveTSDBBlocks))\n441: \tr.Get(\"/status/walreplay\", api.serveWALReplayStatus)\n442: \tr.Get(\"/notifications\", api.notifications)\n443: \tr.Get(\"/notifications/live\", api.notificationsSSE)\n444: \tr.Post(\"/read\", api.ready(api.remoteRead))\n445: \tr.Post(\"/write\", api.ready(api.remoteWrite))\n446: \tr.Post(\"/otlp/v1/metrics\", api.ready(api.otlpWrite))\n447: \n448: \tr.Get(\"/alerts\", wrapAgent(api.alerts))\n449: \tr.Get(\"/rules\", wrapAgent(api.rules))\n450: \n451: \t// Admin APIs\n452: apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{\n469: \t\terrorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid parameter %q: %w\", parameter, err),\n470: \t}, nil, nil}\n471: }\n472: \n473: func (*API) options(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n474: \treturn apiFuncResult{nil, nil, nil, nil}\n475: }\n476: \n477: func (api *API) query(r *http.Request) (result apiFuncResult) {\n478: \tlimit, err := parseLimitParam(r.FormValue(\"limit\"))\n479: \tif err != nil {\n480: \t\treturn invalidParamError(err, \"limit\")\n481: \t}\n482: \tts, err := parseTimeParam(r, \"time\", api.now())\n483: \tif err != api.now().Add(timeout))\n495: \t\tdefer cancel()\n496: \t}\n497: \n498: \topts, err := extractQueryOpts(r)\n499: \tif err != nil {\n500: \t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, err}, nil, nil}\n501: ",

\tAlertingRules() []*rules.AlertingRule\n144: }\n145: \n146: // StatsRenderer converts engine statistics into a format suitable for the API.\n147: type StatsRenderer func(context.Context, *stats.Statistics, string) stats.QueryStats\n148: \n149: // DefaultStatsRenderer is the default stats renderer for the API.\n150: func DefaultStatsRenderer(_ context.Context, s *stats.Statistics, param string) stats.QueryStats {\n151: \tif param != \"\" {\n152: \t\treturn stats.NewQueryStats(s)\n153: \t}\n154: \treturn nil\n155: }\n156: \n157: // PrometheusVersion contains build information about Prometheus.\n158: type PrometheusVersion struct {\n159: \tVersion   string `json:\"version\"`\n160: \tRevision  string `json:\"revision\"`\n161: \tBranch    string `json:\"branch\"`\n162: ...*labels.Matcher) error\n207: \tSnapshot(dir string, withHead bool) error\n208: \tStats(statsByLabelName string, limit int) (*tsdb.Stats, error)\n209: \tWALReplayStatus() (tsdb.WALReplayStatus, error)\n210: \tBlockMetas() ([]tsdb.BlockMeta, error)\n211: }\n212: \n213: type QueryOpts interface {\n214: \tEnablePerStepStats() bool\n215: \tLookbackDelta() time.Duration\n216: }\n217: \n218: // prometheus.Gatherer,\n285: \tregisterer prometheus.Registerer,\n286: \tstatsRenderer StatsRenderer,\n287: \trwEnabled bool,\n288: \tacceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs []config.RemoteWriteProtoMsg,\n289: \ta.InstallCodec(JSONCodec{})\n328: \n329: \tif statsRenderer != nil {\n330: \t\ta.statsRenderer = statsRenderer\n331: \t}\n332: \n333: \tif ap == nil && (rwEnabled || otlpEnabled) {\n334: remote.OTLPOptions{\n342: \t\t\tConvertDelta:            otlpDeltaToCumulative,\n343: \t\t\tNativeDelta:             otlpNativeDeltaIngestion,\n344: \t\t\tLookbackDelta:           lookbackDelta,\n345: installed first take precedence over codecs installed later when evaluating wildcards in Accept headers.\n354: // The first installed codec is used as a fallback when the Accept header cannot be codecs from this API, including the default codec installed by NewAPI.\n360: func (api *API) ClearCodecs() {\n361: \tapi.codecs = nil\n362: }\n363: \n364: func setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(r apiFuncResult) apiFuncResult {\n365: \tif r.err != nil && errors.Is(r.err.err, tsdb.ErrNotReady) {\n366: \t\tr.err.typ = errorUnavailable\n367: \t}\n368: \treturn r\n369: }\n370: \n371: // Register the API's endpoints in the given router.\n372: func (api *API) Register(r *route.Router) {\n373: \twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n374: \t\thf := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n375: \t\t\thttputil.SetCORS(w, api.CORSOrigin, r)\n376: \t\t\tresult := setUnavailStatusOnTSDBNotReady(f(r))\n377: \t\t\tif result.finalizer != nil {\n378: \t\t\t\tdefer result.finalizer()\n379: \t\t\t}\n380: \t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n381: \t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n382: \t\t\t\treturn\n383: \t\t\t}\n384: \n385: \t\t\tif
