You may obtain a copy of the License at\n//\n//     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n//\n// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\nfunc setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", api.postSilences)\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", api.postSilencesBulk)\n\n\treturn api, router\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar silenceResp SilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &silenceResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silenceResp.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingComment(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"comment is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingMatcher(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"at least one matcher is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidStartsAtAfterEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 2)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[0])\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[1])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_EmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tsilences := []Silence{}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_ValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - invalid\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\n\t// Check that the error data contains the validation errors\n\trequire.NotNil(t, resp.Data)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_PartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - missing matchers\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert3\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Third silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Create(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silence.ID)\n\trequire.Equal(t, id, silence.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Get(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tretrieved, err := store.Get(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Matchers, retrieved.Matchers)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Comment, retrieved.Comment)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Delete(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = store.Delete(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = store.Get(id)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MissingEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    nil,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"endsAt is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelName(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"name is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MatcherEmptyValue(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"value is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelNameCharacters(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"invalid label!\", Value: \"value\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"invalid label name\")\n}\n",

{

  "new_string": "func setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\n\t// Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc\n\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\tresult := f(r)\n\t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))\n\n\treturn api, router\n}",
  "old_string": "func setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", api.postSilences)\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", api.postSilencesBulk)\n\n\treturn api, router\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}

and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\nfunc setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", api.postSilences)\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", api.postSilencesBulk)\n\n\treturn api, router\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar silenceResp SilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &silenceResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silenceResp.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingComment(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"comment is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingMatcher(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"at least one matcher is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidStartsAtAfterEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 2)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[0])\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[1])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_EmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tsilences := []Silence{}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_ValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - invalid\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\n\t// Check that the error data contains the validation errors\n\trequire.NotNil(t, resp.Data)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_PartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - missing matchers\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert3\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Third silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Create(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silence.ID)\n\trequire.Equal(t, id, silence.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Get(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tretrieved, err := store.Get(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Matchers, retrieved.Matchers)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Comment, retrieved.Comment)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Delete(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = store.Delete(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = store.Get(id)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MissingEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    nil,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"endsAt is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelName(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"name is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MatcherEmptyValue(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"value is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelNameCharacters(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"invalid label!\", Value: \"value\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"invalid label name\")\n}\n",

        "   router := route.New()",
        "-  router.Post(\"/silences\", api.postSilences)",
        "-  router.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", api.postSilencesBulk)",
        " ",
        "+  // Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc",
        "+  wrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {",
        "+    return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {",
        "+      result := f(r)",
        "+      if result.err != nil {",
        "+        api.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)",
        "+        return",
        "+      }",
        "+      if result.data != nil {",
        "+        api.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))",
        "+        return",
        "+      }",
        "+      w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)",
        "+    })",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  router.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))",
        "+  router.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))",
        "+",
        "   return api, router",
        " }",

    "content": "\t\treturn errors.New(\"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n\t}\n\n\tif s.Comment == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"comment is required\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// postSilences handles POST requests for creating a single silence.\nfunc (api *API) postSilences(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\"unable to read body\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tvar silence Silence\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(body, &silence); err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid JSON: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := validateSilence(&silence); err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, err}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\t// Use the silence store from API (will be injected in constructor)\n\tsilenceStore := api.silenceStore\n\tif silenceStore == nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, errors.New(\"silence store not configured\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := silenceStore.Create(&silence)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\treturn apiFuncResult{&SilenceResponse{ID: id}, nil, nil, nil}\n}\n\n// postSilencesBulk handles POST requests for creating multiple silences atomically.\nfunc (api *API) postSilencesBulk(r *http.Request) apiFuncResult {\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\"unable to read body\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tvar silences []Silence\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(body, &silences); err != nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorBadData, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid JSON: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(silences) == 0 {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{&BulkSilenceResponse{IDs: []string{}}, nil, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate all silences before creating any (atomic semantics)\n\tvalidationErrors := make([]BulkSilenceError, 0)\n\tfor i, silence := range silences {\n\t\tif err := validateSilence(&silence); err != nil {",

  "file": {
    "content": "\t}\n\n\tif len(silences) == 0 {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{&BulkSilenceResponse{IDs: []string{}}, nil, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate all silences before creating any (atomic semantics)\n\tvalidationErrors := make([]BulkSilenceError, 0)\n\tfor i, silence := range silences {\n\t\tif err := validateSilence(&silence); err != nil {\n\t\t\tvalidationErrors = append(validationErrors, BulkSilenceError{\n\t\t\t\tIndex:   i,\n\t\t\t\tMessage: err.Error(),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If there are validation errors, return them all\n\tif len(validationErrors) > 0 {\n\t\terrorData := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"errors\": validationErrors,\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{errorData, &apiError{errorBadData, errors.New(\"validation failed for one or more silences\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\tsilenceStore := api.silenceStore\n\tif silenceStore == nil {\n\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, errors.New(\"silence store not configured\")}, nil, nil}\n\t}\n\n\t// Create all silences\n\tids := make([]string, 0, len(silences))\n\tfor _, silence := range silences {\n\t\ts := silence // Create a copy for the store\n\t\tid, err := silenceStore.Create(&s)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn apiFuncResult{nil, &apiError{errorInternal, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create silence: %w\", err)}, nil, nil}\n\t\t}\n\t\tids = append(ids, id)\n\t}\n\n\treturn apiFuncResult{&BulkSilenceResponse{IDs: ids}, nil, nil, nil}\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/silences.go",
    "numLines": 44,
    "startLine": 200,
    "totalLines": 243
  },

(\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\nfunc setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\n\t// Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc\n\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\tresult := f(r)\n\t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))\n\n\treturn api, router\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar silenceResp SilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &silenceResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silenceResp.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingComment(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"comment is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingMatcher(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"at least one matcher is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidStartsAtAfterEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := TestPostSilencesBulk_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 2)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[0])\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[1])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_EmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tsilences := []Silence{}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_ValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - invalid\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\n\t// Check that the error data contains the validation errors\n\trequire.NotNil(t, resp.Data)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_PartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := TestPostSilencesBulk_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Create(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silence.ID)\n\trequire.Equal(t, id, silence.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Get(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tretrieved, err := store.Get(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Matchers, retrieved.Matchers)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Comment, retrieved.Comment)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Delete(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = store.Delete(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = store.Get(id)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MissingEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    nil,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"endsAt is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelName(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"name is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MatcherEmptyValue(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"value is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelNameCharacters(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"invalid label!\", Value: \"value\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"invalid label name\")\n}\n",

under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\nfunc setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\n\t// Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc\n\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\tresult := f(r)\n\t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))\n\n\treturn api, router\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\tresp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tdata := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, data[\"id\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingComment(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"comment is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingMatcher(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"at least one matcher is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidStartsAtAfterEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", resp.Error, \"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", TestPostSilencesBulk_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 2)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[0])\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[1])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_EmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tsilences := []Silence{}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_ValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - invalid\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\n\t// Check that the error data contains the validation errors\n\trequire.NotNil(t, resp.Data)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_PartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - missing matchers\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert3\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Third silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Create(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silence.ID)\n\trequire.Equal(t, id, silence.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Get(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tretrieved, err := store.Get(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Matchers, retrieved.Matchers)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Comment, retrieved.Comment)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Delete(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = store.Delete(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = store.Get(id)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MissingEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    nil,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"endsAt is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelName(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"name is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MatcherEmptyValue(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"value is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelNameCharacters(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"invalid label!\", Value: \"value\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"invalid label name\")\n}\n",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go",

under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\nfunc setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\n\t// Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc\n\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\tresult := f(r)\n\t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))\n\n\treturn api, router\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\tresp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tdata := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, data[\"id\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingComment(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"comment is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingMatcher(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"at least one matcher is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidStartsAtAfterEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})\n\tids := data[\"ids\"].([]interface{})\n\trequire.Len(t, ids, 2)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_EmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tvar bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_ValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - invalid\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\n\t// Check that the error data contains the validation errors\n\trequire.NotNil(t, resp.Data)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_PartialValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence - missing matchers\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert3\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Third silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Create(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silence.ID)\n\trequire.Equal(t, id, silence.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Get(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tretrieved, err := store.Get(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Matchers, retrieved.Matchers)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Comment, retrieved.Comment)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Delete(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = store.Delete(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = store.Get(id)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MissingEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    nil,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"endsAt is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelName(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"name is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MatcherEmptyValue(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"value is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelNameCharacters(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"invalid label!\", Value: \"value\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"invalid label name\")\n}\n",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go",
  "newString": "import (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)",
  "oldString": "import (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright 2024 The Prometheus Authors\n// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n//\n//     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n//\n// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\"\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/common/route\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n)\n\nfunc setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tapi := &API{\n\t\tsilenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),\n\t\tlogger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),\n\t\tCORSOrigin:   nil,\n\t\tready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },\n\t}\n\n\trouter := route.New()\n\n\t// Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc\n\twrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n\t\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\t\tresult := f(r)\n\t\t\tif result.err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif result.data != nil {\n\t\t\t\tapi.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue(\"query\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))\n\trouter.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))\n\n\treturn api, router\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\tresp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tdata := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, data[\"id\"])\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingComment(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"comment is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_MissingMatcher(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers:  []Matcher{},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"at least one matcher is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidStartsAtAfterEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tearlier := now.Add(-1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &earlier,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Testing silence creation\",\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silence)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"startsAt must be before endsAt\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilences_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilences := []Silence{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert1\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"First silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"Alert2\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\t\tComment:   \"Second silence\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\tresp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"success\", resp.Status)\n\n\tdata := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})\n\tids := data[\"ids\"].([]interface{})\n\trequire.Len(t, ids, 2)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_EmptyArray(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tsilences := []Silence{}\n\n\tbody, _ := json.Marshal(silences)\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader(body))\n\tw := data[\"ids\"].([]interface{})\n\trequire.Len(t, ids, 0)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_ValidationFailure(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater :=
