http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n}\n\nfunc TestPostSilencesBulk_InvalidJSON(t *testing.T) {\n\t_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)\n\n\treq := httptest.NewRequest(\"POST\", \"/silences/bulk\", bytes.NewReader([]byte(\"invalid json\")))\n\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\n\n\trouter.ServeHTTP(w, req)\n\n\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)\n\n\tvar resp Response\n\terr := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"error\", resp.Status)\n\trequire.Contains(t, resp.Error, \"invalid JSON\")\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Create(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, id)\n\trequire.NotEmpty(t, silence.ID)\n\trequire.Equal(t, id, silence.ID)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Get(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tretrieved, err := store.Get(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Matchers, retrieved.Matchers)\n\trequire.Equal(t, silence.Comment, retrieved.Comment)\n}\n\nfunc TestInMemorySilenceStore_Delete(t *testing.T) {\n\tstore := NewInMemorySilenceStore()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := store.Create(silence)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = store.Delete(id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = store.Get(id)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MissingEndsAt(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    nil,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"endsAt is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelName(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"\", Value: \"TestAlert\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"name is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_MatcherEmptyValue(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"alertname\", Value: \"\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"value is required\")\n}\n\nfunc TestValidateSilence_InvalidLabelNameCharacters(t *testing.T) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tlater := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)\n\tsilence := &Silence{\n\t\tMatchers: []Matcher{\n\t\t\t{Name: \"invalid label!\", Value: \"value\", IsRegex: false},\n\t\t},\n\t\tStartsAt:  &now,\n\t\tEndsAt:    &later,\n\t\tCreatedBy: \"test@example.com\",\n\t\tComment:   \"Test silence\",\n\t}\n\n\terr := validateSilence(silence)\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\trequire.Contains(t, err.Error(), \"invalid label name\")\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {

  "stdout": "// Copyright 2024 The Prometheus Authors\n// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n//\n//     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n//\n// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n// limitations under the License.\n\npackage v1\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels\"\n)\n\n// Matcher represents a label matcher.\ntype Matcher struct {\n\tName    string `json:\"name\"`\n\tValue   string `json:\"value\"`\n\tIsRegex bool   `json:\"isRegex\"`\n}\n\n// Silence represents a silence for suppressing alerts.\ntype Silence struct {\n\tID        string     `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tMatchers  []Matcher  `json:\"matchers\"`\n\tStartsAt  *time.Time `json:\"startsAt,omitempty\"`\n\tEndsAt    *time.Time `json:\"endsAt\"`\n\tCreatedBy string     `json:\"createdBy,omitempty\"`\n\tComment   string     `json:\"comment\"`\n}\n\n// SilenceResponse represents the response from creating a silence.\ntype SilenceResponse struct {\n\tID string `json:\"id\"`\n}\n\n// BulkSilenceResponse represents the response from creating multiple silences.\ntype BulkSilenceResponse struct {"
}

91. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/implementation_summary.md << 'EOF'\n# Bulk Silence Creation API Implementation Summary\n\n## Files Created/Modified\n\n### 1. `/workspace/web/api/v1/silences.go` (NEW)\n- **Silence struct**: Represents a silence with matchers, time range, and metadata\n- **Matcher struct**: Represents a label matcher (name, value, isRegex)\n- **SilenceResponse struct**: Response for single silence creation\n- **BulkSilenceResponse struct**: Response for bulk silence creation\n- **BulkSilenceError struct**: Error details for bulk operations with index\n- **SilenceStore interface**: Interface for silence management\n- **InMemorySilenceStore**: In-memory implementation of SilenceStore\n- **validateSilence()**: Validates silence before creation\n- **postSilences()**: Handler for single silence creation (POST /api/v1/silences)\n- **postSilencesBulk()**: Handler for bulk silence creation (POST /api/v1/silences/bulk)\n\n### 2. `/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go` (MODIFIED)\n- Added `silenceStore SilenceStore` field to API struct (line 254)\n- Initialized silenceStore with NewInMemorySilenceStore() in NewAPI() (line 326)\n- Registered routes in Register() function:\n  - `r.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))` (line 455)\n  - `r.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))` (line 456)\n\n### 3. `/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go` (NEW)\n- 17 comprehensive test functions covering:\n  - Single silence creation success cases\n  - Single silence validation failures\n  - Bulk silence creation success cases\n  - Bulk silence empty array handling\n  - Bulk silence validation failures\n  - InMemorySilenceStore operations\n  - Validation edge cases\n\n## Key Features\n\n### Single Silence Creation (/api/v1/silences)\n- Accepts JSON silence object\n- Returns silence ID on success\n- Returns 400 Bad Request with error message on validation failure\n\n### Bulk Silence Creation (/api/v1/silences/bulk)\n- Accepts JSON array of silence objects\n- Validates ALL silences before creating ANY (atomic semantics)\n- Returns array of created silence IDs on success\n- Returns 400 Bad Request with detailed errors including index of failing silence on validation failure\n- Handles empty array correctly\n\n## Validation Rules\n\nAll silences must have:\n1. At least one matcher with non-empty name and value\n2. Valid label names (validated using prometheus/model/labels)\n3. Non-empty comment field\n4. Non-nil endsAt timestamp\n5. startsAt must be before endsAt (if both provided)\n\n## Error Handling\n\n- Follows Prometheus API patterns with apiError struct\n- Returns proper HTTP status codes:\n  - 200: Success\n  - 400: Bad Request (validation errors, invalid JSON)\n  - 500: Internal Server Error (store not configured, etc.)\n- Error responses include detailed messages for debugging\n\n## Test Coverage\n\nTotal test functions: 17\n- Positive cases: 4 (single create success, bulk create success, empty array, store operations)\n- Negative cases: 13 (validation failures, invalid inputs, error scenarios)\n\nTests use httptest and proper setup/teardown with setupSilencesTestAPI() helper\nEOF\ncat /tmp/implementation_summary.md\n"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "# Bulk Silence Creation API Implementation Summary\n\n## Files Created/Modified\n\n### 1. `/workspace/web/api/v1/silences.go` (NEW)\n- **Silence struct**: Represents a silence with matchers, time range, and metadata\n- **Matcher struct**: Represents a label matcher (name, value, isRegex)\n- **SilenceResponse struct**: Response for single silence creation\n- **BulkSilenceResponse struct**: Response for bulk silence creation\n- **BulkSilenceError struct**: Error details for bulk operations with index\n- **SilenceStore interface**: Interface for silence management\n- **InMemorySilenceStore**: In-memory implementation of SilenceStore\n- **validateSilence()**: Validates silence before creation\n- **postSilences()**: Handler for single silence creation (POST /api/v1/silences)\n- **postSilencesBulk()**: Handler for bulk silence creation (POST /api/v1/silences/bulk)\n\n### 2. `/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go` (MODIFIED)\n- Added `silenceStore SilenceStore` field to API struct (line 254)\n- Initialized silenceStore with NewInMemorySilenceStore() in NewAPI() (line 326)\n- Registered routes in Register() function:\n  - `r.Post(\"/silences\", wrap(api.postSilences))` (line 455)\n  - `r.Post(\"/silences/bulk\", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))` (line 456)\n\n### 3. `/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go` (NEW)\n- 17 comprehensive test functions covering:\n  - Single silence creation success cases\n  - Single silence validation failures\n  - Bulk silence creation success cases\n  - Bulk silence empty array handling\n  - Bulk silence validation failures\n  - InMemorySilenceStore operations\n  - Validation edge cases\n\n## Key Features\n\n### Single Silence Creation (/api/v1/silences)\n- Accepts JSON silence object\n- Returns silence ID on success\n- Returns 400 Bad Request with error message on validation failure\n\n### Bulk Silence Creation (/api/v1/silences/bulk)\n- Accepts JSON array of silence objects\n- Validates ALL silences before creating ANY (atomic semantics)\n- Returns array of created silence IDs on success\n- Returns 400 Bad Request with detailed errors including index of failing silence on validation failure\n- Handles empty array correctly\n\n## Validation Rules\n\nAll silences must have:\n1. At least one matcher with non-empty name and value\n2. Valid label names (validated using prometheus/model/labels)\n3. Non-empty comment field\n4. Non-nil endsAt timestamp\n5. startsAt must be before endsAt (if both provided)\n\n## Error Handling\n\n- Follows Prometheus API patterns with apiError struct\n- Returns proper HTTP status codes:\n  - 200: Success\n  - 400: Bad Request (validation errors, invalid JSON)\n  - 500: Internal Server Error (store not configured, etc.)\n- Error responses include detailed messages for debugging\n\n## Test Coverage\n\nTotal test functions: 17\n- Positive cases: 4 (single create success, bulk create success, empty array, store operations)\n- Negative cases: 13 (validation failures, invalid inputs, error scenarios)\n\nTests use httptest and proper setup/teardown with setupSilencesTestAPI() helper"
}

package v1

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels"
)

// Matcher represents a label matcher.
type Matcher struct {
	Name    string `json:"name"`
	Value   string `json:"value"`
	IsRegex bool   `json:"isRegex"`
}

// Silence represents a silence for suppressing alerts.
type Silence struct {
	ID        string     `json:"id,omitempty"`
	Matchers  []Matcher  `json:"matchers"`
	StartsAt  *time.Time `json:"startsAt,omitempty"`
	EndsAt    *time.Time `json:"endsAt"`
	CreatedBy string     `json:"createdBy,omitempty"`
	Comment   string     `json:"comment"`
}

// SilenceResponse represents the response from creating a silence.
type SilenceResponse struct {
	ID string `json:"id"`
}

// BulkSilenceResponse represents the response from creating multiple silences.
type BulkSilenceResponse struct {
	IDs []string `json:"ids"`
}

// BulkSilenceError represents an error for a specific silence in a bulk request.
type BulkSilenceError struct {
	Index   int    `json:"index"`
	Message string `json:"message"`
}

// SilenceStore interface for managing silences.
type SilenceStore interface {
	Create(s *Silence) (string, error)
	Get(
... (truncated)

package v1

import (
	"bytes"
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
	"time"

	"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog"
	"github.com/prometheus/common/route"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

func setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {
	t.Helper()

	api := &API{
		silenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),
		logger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),
		CORSOrigin:   nil,
		ready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },
	}

	router := route.New()
	router.Post("/silences", api.postSilences)
	router.Post("/silences/bulk", api.postSilencesBulk)

	return api, router
}

func TestPostSilences_Success(t *testing.T) {
	_, router := setupSilencesTestAPI(t)

	now := time.Now()
	later := now.Add(1 * time.Hour)
	silence := Silence{
		Matchers: []Matcher{
			{Name: "alertname", Value: "TestAlert", IsRegex: false},
		},
		StartsAt:  &now,
		EndsAt:    &later,
		CreatedBy: "test@example.com",
		Comment:   "Testing silence creation",
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(silence)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/silences", bytes.NewReader(body))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	router.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	require.Equal(t, h
... (truncated)
6. EDIT /workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go
Before
func setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {
	t.Helper()

	api := &API{
		silenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),
		logger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),
		CORSOrigin:   nil,
		ready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },
	}

	router := route.New()
	router.Post("/silences", api.postSilences)
	router.Post("/silences/bulk", api.postSilencesBulk)

	return api, router
}
After
func setupSilencesTestAPI(t *testing.T) (*API, *route.Router) {
	t.Helper()

	api := &API{
		silenceStore: NewInMemorySilenceStore(),
		logger:       promslog.New(&promslog.Config{}),
		CORSOrigin:   nil,
		ready:        func(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc { return f },
	}

	router := route.New()

	// Wrap handlers to convert apiFunc to http.HandlerFunc
	wrap := func(f apiFunc) http.HandlerFunc {
		return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
			result := f(r)
			if result.err != nil {
				api.respondError(w, result.err, result.data)
				return
			}
			if result.data != nil {
				api.respond(w, r, result.data, result.warnings, r.FormValue("query"))
				return
			}
			w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
		})
	}

	router.Post("/silences", wrap(api.postSilences))
	router.Post("/silences/bulk", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))

	return api, router
}
7. EDIT /workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go
Before
	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var resp Response
	err := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "success", resp.Status)

	var silenceResp SilenceResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &silenceResp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.NotEmpty(t, silenceResp.ID)
After
	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var resp Response
	resp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})
	err := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "success", resp.Status)

	data := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})
	require.NotEmpty(t, data["id"])
8. EDIT /workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go
Before
	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var resp Response
	err := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "success", resp.Status)

	var bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 2)
	require.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[0])
	require.NotEmpty(t, bulkResp.IDs[1])
After
	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var resp Response
	resp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})
	err := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "success", resp.Status)

	data := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})
	ids := data["ids"].([]interface{})
	require.Len(t, ids, 2)
9. EDIT /workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go
Before
	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var resp Response
	err := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "success", resp.Status)

	var bulkResp BulkSilenceResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(resp.Data.(json.RawMessage), &bulkResp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Len(t, bulkResp.IDs, 0)
After
	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var resp Response
	resp.Data = make(map[string]interface{})
	err := json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &resp)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	require.Equal(t, "success", resp.Status)

	data := resp.Data.(map[string]interface{})
	ids := data["ids"].([]interface{})
	require.Len(t, ids, 0)

28. $ cat > /tmp/implementation_summary.md << 'EOF'
# Bulk Silence Creation API Implementation Summary

## Files Created/Modified

### 1. `/workspace/web/api/v1/silences.go` (NEW)
- **Silence struct**: Represents a silence with matchers, time range, and metadata
- **Matcher struct**: Represents a label matcher (name, value, isRegex)
- **SilenceResponse struct**: Response for single silence creation
- **BulkSilenceResponse struct**: Response for bulk silence creation
- **BulkSilenceError struct**: Error details for bulk operations with index
- **SilenceStore interface**: Interface for silence management
- **InMemorySilenceStore**: In-memory implementation of SilenceStore
- **validateSilence()**: Validates silence before creation
- **postSilences()**: Handler for single silence creation (POST /api/v1/silences)
- **postSilencesBulk()**: Handler for bulk silence creation (POST /api/v1/silences/bulk)

### 2. `/workspace/web/api/v1/api.go` (MODIFIED)
- Added `silenceStore SilenceStore` field to API struct (line 254)
- Initialized silenceStore with NewInMemorySilenceStore() in NewAPI() (line 326)
- Registered routes in Register() function:
  - `r.Post("/silences", wrap(api.postSilences))` (line 455)
  - `r.Post("/silences/bulk", wrap(api.postSilencesBulk))` (line 456)

### 3. `/workspace/web/api/v1/silences_test.go` (NEW)
- 17 comprehensive test functions covering:
  - Single silence creation success cases
  - Single silence validation failures
  - Bulk silence creation success cases
  - Bulk silence empty array handling
  - Bulk silence validation failures
  - InMemorySilenceStore operations
  - Validation edge cases

## Key Features

### Single Silence Creation (/api/v1/silences)
- Accepts JSON silence object
- Returns silence ID on success
- Returns 400 Bad Request with error message on validation failure

### Bulk Silence Creation (/api/v1/silences/bulk)
- Accepts JSON array of silence objects
- Validates ALL silences before creating ANY (atomic semantics)
- Returns array of created silence IDs on success
- Returns 400 Bad Request with detailed errors including index of failing silence on validation failure
- Handles empty array correctly

## Validation Rules

All silences must have:
1. At least one matcher with non-empty name and value
2. Valid label names (validated using prometheus/model/labels)
3. Non-empty comment field
4. Non-nil endsAt timestamp
5. startsAt must be before endsAt (if both provided)

## Error Handling

- Follows Prometheus API patterns with apiError struct
- Returns proper HTTP status codes:
  - 200: Success
  - 400: Bad Request (validation errors, invalid JSON)
  - 500: Internal Server Error (store not configured, etc.)
- Error responses include detailed messages for debugging

## Test Coverage

Total test functions: 17
- Positive cases: 4 (single create success, bulk create success, empty array, store operations)
- Negative cases: 13 (validation failures, invalid inputs, error scenarios)

Tests use httptest and proper setup/teardown with setupSilencesTestAPI() helper
EOF
cat /tmp/implementation_summary.md

31. $ grep -A 2 "silenceStore SilenceStore" /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go
32. $ grep -B 2 -A 2 "silences" /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go | head -20
